programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly agrees to do charity work at a hospital, but proves so popular with the patients that he starts spending more time with them than at home - much to wife Debras dismay. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandlers favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is nominated for a minor daytime drama award, Monica realises she will never again feel the thrill of a new romance and a student tells Ross he is in love with him. With Matt LeBlanc and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross and Monicas Cousin
programme.desc: Monica is visited by a cousin she has not seen since childhood, whose stunning looks do not go unnoticed by Chandler. Rachel and Phoebe plan a last-minute bridal party, while Joey tries to trick his way into an acting role. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel meets an old college friend and wonders whether she should confront her about a boozy incident from their past that took a dramatic and passionate turn. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross vie to outdo one another in the tuxedo stakes for the impending wedding. Winona Ryder guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: With the wedding only four weeks away, Chandler struggles to write his vows and turns to Joey and Ross for much-needed help. Meanwhile, Monica has similar difficulties and recruits Phoebe and Rachel - but they soon get distracted and start reminiscing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica convinces a reluctant Chandler to travel to Las Vegas to invite his estranged father to their wedding, while Rachel gets into trouble for driving Monicas Porsche. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part One

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The gang continues to search for the missing Chandler, who is still suffering a severe case of premarital jitters. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as nutritionists conducting consultations, and ask shoppers at a grocery store if they should quit

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra throws a bridal shower for Amy, but Marie tries to take over and monopolises the event. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robert and Amy prepare to tie the knot in a classic Barone family wedding ceremony - but the groom becomes suspicious when his future brother-in-law Peter tries to make peace with both him and Ray. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Celebrity experts offering advice are Liza Tarbuck on art, Iain Stirling on Scotland, Rachel Riley on maths, Trevor Nelson on disco, GK Barry on celebrities, Gabby Logan on the Six Nations and Chris McCausland on Back to the Future

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Chandlers nerves get the better of him on the eve of his wedding and he disappears, leading to a frantic search by Ross. Joey rehearses for a film role with a major star, while Phoebe and Rachel make a startling discovery. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner, Elliott Gould and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The gang continues to search for the missing Chandler, who is still suffering a severe case of premarital jitters. Joey tries desperately to be released from his role in a major film so he can act as minister at the wedding. Gary Oldman and Kathleen Turner guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. Chandler has trouble on the dance floor and Joey tries to impress an important Broadway producer with his acting ability. Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. Eric dumps Ursula for twin sister Phoebe, and Monica suspects her new maid could be stealing her jeans - among other things. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe try to avoid helping in the kitchen and Joey vows to eat an entire turkey. Guest starring Brad Pitt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. Rachel mediates between an angry Joey and his pregnant sister, while Monica spends a fortune on a new pair of boots - only to find they hurt her feet. Guest starring Trudie Styler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Creepy Holiday Card
programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: Rachel hits the town with Joey to coach him for a big date the following night, but the pair are so compatible they begin to see each other in a different light. Chandler sets a new record on Monicas game machine, and Ross teaches a class on the other side of town

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: Monica mistakenly believes Joey is infatuated with Phoebe, and Chandler discovers the pleasures of a scented bath. Rachel vows not to find out the sex of her unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: A concerned Joey takes Rachel to the hospital and realises his romantic feelings for her could be excluding Ross from the joys of fatherhood. Chandler becomes obsessed with learning the contents of a secret closet and Monica shocks Phoebe by responding rather too enthusiastically to a massage

programme.title: Paul (2011)
programme.desc: An alien held captive in a top-secret American military base escapes and hides out in the van of two English comic-book geeks on a tour of UFO hotspots. The wisecracking extraterrestrial enlists the duos help in getting back to his spaceship, but they are soon pursued by government agents and unwittingly become kidnappers. Sci-fi comedy, starring Simon Pegg and Nick Frost, with the voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: Lee Evans Live at Wembley
programme.desc: A performance by the energetic comedian in front of a sell-out 10,000-strong crowd at Wembley Arena

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Colin Mochrie spices up a Cajun alligator hunting scene with Chippendales and 50 Shades of Grey. while Wayne and Jonathan sing songs about horror films in different musical styles

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Bachelorette Brad must choose between Robocop, a starving castaway and a nervy gazelle in Lets Make a Date. Colin and Ryan imagine a kinky Luke Skywalker and Prince Leia in Secret

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Residents of the town are horrified to learn that a beloved icon used drugs, and as a result stop wearing their yellow inspiration bracelets - all except for Stan

programme.title: Fat Chat with Desiree Burch
programme.desc: Comedian Helen Bauer joins Desiree, with the conversation ranging from Helens date at her Year 11 prom through to tips on secret-eating bread

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Me the People
programme.desc: Comedy special in which Jeff tackles how much time people dedicate to their devices, the things they spend money on, and cancel culture

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: Hosted by Jon Stewart

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: Pilot (The One Where Monica Gets a Room-mate)

Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to enjoy bachelorhood when his lesbian wife walks out on him, while Phoebe supports herself playing guitar in the subway. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother enjoying a walk in the Kent countryside were the victims of a frenzied hammer attack by Michael Stone, who left them for dead. Lin Russell and her six-year-old daughter Megan died from their injuries, but nine-year-old Josie survived and made a remarkable recovery. This film examines the events surrounding the murders and features interviews with Shaun Russell - Lins widower and the girls father - Josies close friend Lucy Gregson, her former primary school teacher Lynda Roberts and police family liaison officer Pauline Smith

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The story of nurse Beverley Allitt, who was thought to be a caring and astute worker, until it was revealed she killed four children and tried to murder 11 others

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On July 1, 2000, eight-year-old Sarah Payne went missing while playing in a field near her grandparents home in West Sussex, and her disappearance prompted a nationwide search. On July 17, her body was found near Pulborough, and soon after convicted paedophile Roy Whiting was charged with her abduction and murder. In this documentary, Sara Payne relives the day her daughter went missing and recounts the horror and agonising days that unfolded in its wake. She also speaks about her fight to change the system in the UK so parents could find out if a child sex offender was living in their area

programme.desc: On July 1, 2000, eight-year-old Sarah Payne went missing while playing in a field near her grandparents home in West Sussex, and her disappearance prompted a nationwide search. On July 17, her body was found near Pulborough, and soon after convicted paedophile Roy Whiting was charged with her abduction and murder. In this documentary, Sara Payne relives the day her daughter went missing and recounts the horror and agonising days that unfolded in its wake. She also speaks about her fight to change the system in the UK so parents could find out if a child sex offender was living in their area

programme.title: Through the Wormhole with Morgan Freeman

programme.desc: Scientists look inside the mechanisms of ageing and imagine a world where death is cured like a disease, asking whether we are about to enter a new age of immortality

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The methods used to catch the worlds largest lobsters. Plus, production of the iconic Chesterfield sofa and methods used to achieve the worlds sharpest TV pictures

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.desc: Kevin and the team take to the streets to create a massive, swirling fire tornado out of kerosene, and dazzle onlookers with a rainbow-coloured flamethrower

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. However, John Wick does receive support from Sofia, a fellow dog lover, assassin and manager of Casablancas Continental Hotel. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Michael McIntyres The Wheel, Love is Blind, Strictly Come Dancing, Boiling Point, HELP! My House is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Dont Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, a revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Dom is left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, and Warren is determined to get to the truth

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at the Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is forced into a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his sons entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job does not go to plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While Barrys love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries convincing Murray to take up new hobbies

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family goes to Gloria and Jays house for a barbecue and to watch the football, but an incident at school involving Manny and Luke creates tension between Claire and her host. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The first day of school arrives and Phil misreads how Claire is coping with an empty house, while Jay and Gloria disagree over what Manny should wear. Mitchell and Cameron are very upset when Lily gets a bump to the head. Starring Ed ONeill (Married with Children) and Julie Bowen (Boston Legal)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty two-year-old Sophie needs to find the right guy to earn her trust and tempt her away from the comforts and convenience of living with her parents. She hopes Adam from the Wirral will change her outlook on life. Connor, who owns a collection of brightly coloured ties, is introduced to fellow accessory-lover Kemis, while adventurous 73-year-old Mike is paired with fitness fanatic Coleen, a widow who is ready to meet someone to share fresh experiences with

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigis in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owners father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lilys paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Luton, Bedfordshire, battle it out in the culinary contest, beginning with Bridget and her husband Peter, whose menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites leaves their rivals distinctly unimpressed. Next to host are Shawn and Kendra, who prepare dishes based on their travels, before serving up a dessert that reflects their Canadian heritage. Finally, footballer Richard and his fiancee Marina decide to cook an Italian-inspired meal - but Richard proves to be more of a hindrance than a help in the kitchen. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The doubles version of the culinary challenge series heads to north Devon, where busy parents Matt and Sarah are the first hosts, but their decision to serve crisps as canapes does not go down well with some of their rivals. Next up are competitive foodies James and Laura, who put together a similar menu to their predecessors - but with more flair. The final party is thrown by am-dram couple Jake and Ian, and their guests have high expectations that the pairs mushroom bruschetta starter and casserole main look set to miss

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch?When Francis and Juanita moved from India to Canada five years ago, they bought the first house they could afford. They still love their home, but theyve had two new additions to their family and outgrown it. While Jonathan tries to make it look brand-spanking new, Drew innovatively searches for a high-class house. Short:Francis, Juanita and their two kids still love their home but theyve outgrown it. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.desc: In north Devon, married couple Frankie and Jason kick off the competition. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the companys front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. However, little do they realise that Eric is going to try to fool them by appearing as a waiter. Featuring Kat Cole, Paul Damico, Andy Wiederhorn, Sheldon Yellen, Anthony Wedo and Jane Grote Abell

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Leeds compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with construction manager Martin and his wife Amanda, who are determined to win. They are rivalled by competitive engaged couple Amy and Nico who impress with their entertainment and Hannah and Nick, who try to prove their doubters wrong by cooking duck to order

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colin and Mandy kick proceedings off in Bristol with a colourful and spicy assortment of courses, while their guests are treated to a night of conversation about romantic meetings, outrageous shirts and naked gardening. Next, PJ and Owen defy expectations and create a fancy menu, but their purple potato mash is more like play-doh, while Geoff and Gemma round things off with a hearty and rich selection of courses. Who will secure the £1000 prize?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Michael McIntyres The Wheel, Love is Blind, Strictly Come Dancing, Boiling Point, HELP! My House is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Dont Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, a revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Dom is left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, and Warren is determined to get to the truth

Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.desc: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job does not go to plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While Barrys love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries convincing Murray to take up new hobbies

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family goes to Gloria and Jays house for a barbecue and to watch the football, but an incident at school involving Manny and Luke creates tension between Claire and her host. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The first day of school arrives and Phil misreads how Claire is coping with an empty house, while Jay and Gloria disagree over what Manny should wear. Mitchell and Cameron are very upset when Lily gets a bump to the head. Starring Ed ONeill (Married with Children) and Julie Bowen (Boston Legal)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty two-year-old Sophie needs to find the right guy to earn her trust and tempt her away from the comforts and convenience of living with her parents. She hopes Adam from the Wirral will change her outlook on life. Connor, who owns a collection of brightly coloured ties, is introduced to fellow accessory-lover Kemis, while adventurous 73-year-old Mike is paired with fitness fanatic Coleen, a widow who is ready to meet someone to share fresh experiences with

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigis in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owners father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lilys paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil finds himself in an awkward situation when he meets his former high-school girlfriend, who confesses she still has feelings for him, while Mitchell stands up to his boss and Jay summons up the courage to confess he killed Mannys turtle

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The trip moves into its final week in Almancil in Portugal, and a fresh pair of arrivals kick off a dramatic and shocking twist that puts everyones place on the coach at risk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner uses his Counter Truancy Unit to thwart a possible terror attack at Springfield Elementarys Annual Bake Sale. Rogue agent Bart could be the only hope of stopping the plot - until he clashes with Jack Bauer, who is on an important mission of his own. With the voices of 24s Kiefer Sutherland and Mary-Lynn Rajskub

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Kent Always Say What You Want
programme.desc: Homer accidentally causes the sacking of newsreader Kent Brockman - who moves in with the family and sets about trying to win his job back by conducting a high-profile campaign against unethical media practices. With the voice of rapper Ludacris

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson is up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision, and a sister is backed into a corner

programme.desc: The first Commitment Ceremony delivers emotional highs, brutal honesty and explosive fallout as Revelations Week takes its toll. While some couples reflect on progress and renewed connection, others are pushed to breaking point. A leave decision shocks everyone in the room, one bride is blindsided, and buried tensions between the brides finally erupt when accusations of inauthenticity spark a fiery showdown between Brook and Stella

programme.desc: The group return from Scotland and Kit reveals that hes been messaging Inga, leaving a newly single Jazz left questioning her feelings for her friend. After attempting to build bridges with Beks in Scotland, Freddy soon finds himself back in her bad books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A documentary film-maker visits Springfield to see how the towns residents are progressing, making Homer worry he will not be seen as a success. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire help out with their childrens school projects, while Gloria and Cameron spend quality time together. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents relationship

Those hoping to meet the person of their dreams include Swiss-born neuroscience student Sophie, personal trainer Craig and part-time model Louis. After attempting to build bridges with Beks in Scotland, Freddy soon finds himself back in her bad books

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job does not go to plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While Barrys love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries convincing Murray to take up new hobbies

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Tommy, who decided a wedding on water skis was the way forward, given his bride Hannahs champion experience in the sport

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at the Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is forced into a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson is up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision, and a sister is backed into a corner

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigis in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owners father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica attempts to fool Beverly into thinking a parents weekend has been rescheduled. Meanwhile, Adam joins the school production of Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: A 100 Per Cent True Ghost Story
programme.desc: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry resolves to throw a Halloween party for the ages - no matter what Erica says. Beverly and Murray square off over whether or not their house is haunted

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny reopens Mitchells old childhood wound when he takes up fencing, with support from Jay and the rest of the family, and Phil tries to find out if Luke has any hidden talents. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire determines to give Phil the perfect anniversary present and lose her reputation for offering bad gifts, so she hires one of their favourite musicians for a private performance. Mitchell and Cams party girl friend Sal comes to visit. Guest starring Edward Norton and Elizabeth Banks

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The first Commitment Ceremony delivers emotional highs, brutal honesty and explosive fallout as Revelations Week takes its toll. While some couples reflect on progress and renewed connection, others are pushed to breaking point. A leave decision shocks everyone in the room, one bride is blindsided, and buried tensions between the brides finally erupt when accusations of inauthenticity spark a fiery showdown between Brook and Stella

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A Disney fan seeks a fresh start after losing her last partner due to a tragic accident, while 27-year-old Craig wants to find a man who will share his love of dogs. A retired Butlins redcoat has high hopes for her date, and a woman who has not enjoyed much luck on the dating scene may have finally found the man she is looking for

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Parks Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorges in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duos suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A documentary film-maker visits Springfield to see how the towns residents are progressing, making Homer worry he will not be seen as a success. In an attempt to convince the director of his so-called achievements, he borrows Mr Burns summer mansion, but his cunning plan does not have the desired effect. With the voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire help out with their childrens school projects, while Gloria and Cameron spend quality time together. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Manny learn they have more in common than they thought during a trip to watch a meteor shower with Jay. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.desc: The group reach dizzying new heights while parasailing in Vilamoura, Portugal, while time learning the art of ju-jitsu gives them a chance to let out some of their pent-up anger

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents relationship

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren decides who he wants, but he may be too late, and friends gather around to support Diane and Tony

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The show restaurant opens its doors for a special episode in aid of Stand Up to Cancer, with maitre d Fred and his team welcoming hopeful single people from across the country who are unaware that some of the dinner dates will be famous faces, including Jorgie Porter, Jamie Laing and Anthea Turner. Those hoping to meet the person of their dreams include Swiss-born neuroscience student Sophie, personal trainer Craig and part-time model Louis. Plus, 54-year-old hairdresser and model Gary hopes to meet a man with va-va-voom

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.desc: Guy Fieri seeks out flavourful meat! He checks out Mexican pork sandwiches in Memphis, Tennessee, and rich short ribs in St. Simons Island, Georgia

programme.desc: Casey Webbs quest takes him to Brooklyn for a barbecue and deli feast. Plus, he samples an Italian seafood staple and takes on a spicy shrimp challenge

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers are on the Yorkshire coast. Starting on one of Scarborough beautiful beaches, the bikers meet Jamie. His company is the first one to farm seaweed offshore. In Aike, they visit a family run vineyard and winery, Laurel Vines, and borrow the familys kitchen to prepare moules mariniere, triple-cooked chips and their own northern baguette. They also visit Malton and Whitby, before preparing a final dish back in Scarborough - a beer and miso BBQ chicken with grilled, marinated aubergine

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares ideas for quick and easy game-day meals, including a five-cheese pepperoni pizza and then a tasty millionaire shortbread

programme.desc: Ree Drummond demonstrates how to prepare a meatball and polenta casserole and hasselback chicken

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver creates minty pea tortiglioni on a trip to Rome and is put through his paces by a gnocchi master, before cooking up gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto. Also on the menu, linguine with wild asparagus, linguine with sausage and broccoli, and courgette, pancetta and tomato salad

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo are high up in the snow-capped Italian Alps, seeking out Piedmonts famous comfort food, including macaroni cheese with an alpine twist. Jamie rustles up dumplings with roasted red onions and crispy pancetta and also learns the kitchen secrets of the real risotto queens with a classic red wine, sausage and alpine cheese risotto

programme.desc: Na Garten prepares a series of recipes with fruit as the main ingredient

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The four semi-finalists face three French challenges, beginning by preparing three types of savoury canapes in just two-and-a-half hours. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Contestants from last years series talk about their experiences of life inside the tent. programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Saint-Tropez, where a local tour guide explains how Brigitte Bardot transformed the town from a quiet fishing village to an international hotspot. After exploring the area, James drops in on old friend Michel Roux and they prepare a rather special barbecue

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the port of Marseille, where the fishermen are selling fresh seafood from the back of their boats, and buys sea bass for an outdoor cook on the waterside. James also takes his beloved 2CV to the world-famous Circuit Paul Ricard to cook his take on Piperade

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers explore Cumbria and the Lake District. The Lakes is the most visited national park in England, and with such incredible scenery, its not hard to see why. Dave takes Si around his beloved home turf in search of the best produce and food that this beautiful place can offer, cooking a fantastic Cumbrian breakfast, a summer vegetable strudel and a Thai feast along the way

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates the opening of her new sweet shop. For the occasions, she makes an incredible jewelled divinity and two over-the-top ice cream sundaes

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a dinner to-go for a new cowboy on the ranch. The main course is a chicken jalapeno popper casserole, followed by pretzel rolls and watermelon

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers viewers the ultimate set of go-to recipes for quick and easy-to-remember cooking having developed a collection of tasty dishes that each use just five ingredients, producing stress-free meals perfect for busy days and for those people who dont have the time or energy to devote to complicated cooking. On the menu in the first edition are seared scallops with black pudding, mashed potatoes and peas, as well as egg and mango chutney flatbreads, rib-eye steak, and an almond pastry puff

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates four more stress-free recipes that each use only five ingredients each, including sesame seared tuna, a messy meatball bun and chocolate rye cookies. To top it all off, he prepares a hearty chicken pot pie, a comforting classic with a quick and easy hack for the perfect crispy crust

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Na Garten shares her vegetable based recipes for main courses, starters, salads and side-dishes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten samples a dinner of chicken with wild mushrooms and green salad, before cooking a baked goats cheese at Sinskeys vineyard

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve contestants battle it out to be named best amateur baker of 2014, beginning by tackling a Swiss roll, a cherry cake and miniature British classics. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present and judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood cast a critical eye over the contenders efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Having shown they have what it takes to bake a cake or two, the 11 remaining contestants turn their attention to biscuits. First up they create their signature savoury crackers for cheese, and are encouraged to push the flavour. In the technical challenge, they have to prepare Mary Berrys Florentines, with their chewy caramel sauce and brandy-snap texture, before ending with a showstopper like no other - three-dimensional scenes made entirely from biscuits. For one hopeful, there will be the pride of being crowned Star Baker, while another will be sent home - well aware that thats just the way the cookie crumbles. Hosted by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs culinary tour of France leads him to the diverse and distinct region of the Camargue, a natural region located south of Arles. James begins at Les Marquises, the Laurent familys farm, where he learns about the Camargue bull, and barbecues local fish for the family. Later, he visits a rice farm and cooks a risotto using his own rice-brewed beer

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the city of Arles, famous for its Roman architecture and the largest market in Provence. While there James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams - all from the stalls around him. He also has a go at pottery with a local ceramicist, visits an award-winning wine producer - who causes him to rethink the merits of rose wine - and heads to an olive grove where he cooks fried lamb chops with baby aubergines

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives more of the nations favourite dishes a twist, making sticky toffee pudding with his mother Sally and rustling up a mouth-watering steak and onion sandwich. The chef also prepares an Italian classic - osso buco with saffron risotto

programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers are on the Yorkshire coast. Starting on one of Scarborough beautiful beaches, the bikers meet Jamie. His company is the first one to farm seaweed offshore. They also visit Malton and Whitby, before preparing a final dish back in Scarborough - a beer and miso BBQ chicken with grilled, marinated aubergine

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy

programme.desc: The four semi-finalists face three French challenges, beginning by preparing three types of savoury canapes in just two-and-a-half hours. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Contestants from last years series talk about their experiences of life inside the tent. programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers explore Cumbria and the Lake District. The Lakes is the most visited national park in England, and with such incredible scenery, its not hard to see why. programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers viewers the ultimate set of go-to recipes for quick and easy-to-remember cooking having developed a collection of tasty dishes that each use just five ingredients, producing stress-free meals perfect for busy days and for those people who dont have the time or energy to devote to complicated cooking. On the menu in the first edition are seared scallops with black pudding, mashed potatoes and peas, as well as egg and mango chutney flatbreads, rib-eye steak, and an almond pastry puff

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates four more stress-free recipes that each use only five ingredients each, including sesame seared tuna, a messy meatball bun and chocolate rye cookies. programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten samples a dinner of chicken with wild mushrooms and green salad, before cooking a baked goats cheese at Sinskeys vineyard

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve contestants battle it out to be named best amateur baker of 2014, beginning by tackling a Swiss roll, a cherry cake and miniature British classics. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present and judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood cast a critical eye over the contenders efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Having shown they have what it takes to bake a cake or two, the 11 remaining contestants turn their attention to biscuits. First up they create their signature savoury crackers for cheese, and are encouraged to push the flavour. In the technical challenge, they have to prepare Mary Berrys Florentines, with their chewy caramel sauce and brandy-snap texture, before ending with a showstopper like no other - three-dimensional scenes made entirely from biscuits. For one hopeful, there will be the pride of being crowned Star Baker, while another will be sent home - well aware that thats just the way the cookie crumbles. Hosted by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs culinary tour of France leads him to the diverse and distinct region of the Camargue, a natural region located south of Arles. James begins at Les Marquises, the Laurent familys farm, where he learns about the Camargue bull, and barbecues local fish for the family. Later, he visits a rice farm and cooks a risotto using his own rice-brewed beer

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the city of Arles, famous for its Roman architecture and the largest market in Provence. While there James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams - all from the stalls around him. He also has a go at pottery with a local ceramicist, visits an award-winning wine producer - who causes him to rethink the merits of rose wine - and heads to an olive grove where he cooks fried lamb chops with baby aubergines

Of course, there can be no secrets in the Ballykissangel community _ word gets out and Niamh organises a surprise reception. Comedy drama, starring Tony Doyle, Gary Whelan and Deirdre Donnelly

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Len and Linda are delighted when their first foster child arrives, but their joy is cut short by the discovery that the youngster isnt quite what they were expecting. Meanwhile, Tom and Arthur bicker over the medical treatment of Rita Lennox, the woman sent to turn the local pub into a tourist trap

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Drama set in 1895, chronicling the personal and professional consequences of Eleanor Bramwells determined quest to become the first female surgeon at the East London Hospital. The first episode sees Eleanor embarking on her medical career - and immediately crossing swords with eminent surgeon Sir Herbert Hamilton. Jemma Redgrave stars in the title role, with David Calder as her father, and Robert Hardy as Sir Herbert

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles wants to seed a new field and decides to obtain a loan from the new banker, Ebenezer Sprague. The cold-hearted gentleman refuses to trust Charles and his family until Laura unwittingly befriends him at the fishing hole. Their friendship and its abrupt end shows the banker that no man should worry about making any true friends

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A talented player leaves the townsfolk convinced they will win an annual baseball game. Star pitcher Mumford appears to be an ace up Walnut Groves sleeve, until his wife discovers the townspeople are betting heavily on the games outcome. To put a stop to the madness, she benches him, leaving Caroline to persuade Mrs Mumford to allow him to play. The troubles of the Walnut Grove team are not over, however, between arguments of the rightful name of the team, to Sleepy Eyes Green Stockings win-at-any-cost attitude, the battle for the game is fought in quite an unorthodox manner

programme.desc: The tension between Tom and Arthur reaches breaking point, and it seems a journey to New Zealand is on the cards for one of the doctors. She learns that he is waiting for his beloved wife, an actress, to return home. Laura excitedly volunteers to help in fixing up the place until a trip to Mankato shows that his wife is in fact dead and not coming back. Laura then must help him overcome his denial and sorrow, when she tells him that his wife is dead

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: In Texas, a popular high school athlete is found murdered in her bedroom. Detectives learn she was hiding a secret that leads them to her killer

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Horror, starring Peter Cushing and Edward Judd

Action adventure, with Jean-Claude Van Damme and Rosanna Arquette

Thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds

Western, directed by and starring Kirk Douglas. With Bruce Dern and Bo Hopkins

programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. In the Urgent Treatment Unit 19 year-old Pavni and 21-year-old Sarah meet while waiting for treatment after what they suspect to be needle-spiking. While being treated Pavni talks about the racist abuse she faced growing up and Sarah reveals the impact COVID-19 has had on her university experience

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whos passed out for the third time that day, and a man in his 40s with chest pain and a family history of heart failure that could be causing him anxiety. A man is found intoxicated and collapsed in the street, and a woman trips on some stairs and badly cuts her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is rushed in with suspected sepsis and his wife shares her experience as his full-time carer. Sixty-one-year-old Jillian comes in after a fall and recalls when her husband was diagnosed with stage four bowel cancer. Keith arrives with a fast heart rate and while staff urgently try to bring it down his wife talks about raising deaf children and being diagnosed with the deaf gene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Blackburn chemistry teacher and self-confessed culture-vulture Shabaz leads his rivals on a tour of Portos historical sights, before a performance of fado - melancholy Portuguese music that looks set to give the others the blues

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brigitte Tee, who runs four-star BandB Gorse Meadow in the New Forest, hosts the first round of the competition. Her guests are initially charmed by her eccentric personality, but the discovery of a bathroom window in need of repair and another room containing ladybirds, cobwebs and dust soon takes the shine off their stay

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Suffolk, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet former agony aunt Janet, whose garden shed is crammed with goodies. With no motors to unearth, Henry makes a rare furniture discovery, while Simon finds a vintage tram bench

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Andi and Neil from York, who dream of retiring permanently to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Theyre looking for a three-bedroom house with a dog-friendly garden, where barbeque enthusiast Neil can cook up a storm close to the beach close to the coastal town of Mazarron, near Murcia. Laura has five sizzling options for their budget of £145,000, but will any of them turn out to be their new forever home?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests shes hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neils very own creation, head in a jar, its proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Swan Inn, in Midhurst, West Sussex, where guests enjoy an alfresco breakfast in the market square - and encounter a shocking hidden cupboard

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The battling BandB owners visit Osterley Park Hotel in Isleworth, where owner Sunny Pharroda reveals that hospitality was not his first career, leading to some tough questions about his suitability as a host. To make matters worse, as the guests prepare for bed, one contestant makes an early checkout

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals turn up at Plover Cottage in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, where they are amazed by the space, although Liz and Gary find more than they bargained for in their room and the self-catering conditions are a concern for some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Forge Guest Rooms in Long Whatton, Leicestershire, owned by Liz and Gary Scottorn. The guests love the luxury, but Cleide questions eating breakfast beside a hot tub. In the evening, theres drama over drinks as Sunny causes Liz to defend her levels of cleanliness. At breakfast, Sunny isnt sure how to work the cooking facilities. Cleide and John feel cramped eating croissants leading to consternation come feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Criticisms and comments are all laid bare, as Digby reveals how much he paid for a room he didnt even spend the night in. Cleide also defends her decision not to offer welcome packs on arrival. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is finally announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Norfolk to take on the restoration of an under-rated French hot hatch - a 1997 Peugeot 106 Rallye. The car belongs to 21-year-old student Senna, who comes from a family of petrolheads

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend pick up a 1972 Renault Alpine A110 rally racer belonging to a former Italian restaurateur who has owned it for 20 years but never actually driven it

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of first-time buyers who are struggling to find homes. In Southampton, Jenny and Tom are keen to move out of their cramped rental property and into a house of their own, but they are facing fierce competition and a fast market. Meanwhile, in the New Forest, Georgie and Will are desperate to live together after seven years of being a couple. However, with Will working in Belgium during the week, the pair are finding suitable properties are snapped up before they have even had the chance to view them

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Larne in Northern Ireland with Catherine and Nigel Finch, who have been married for seven years, but lately have hit a spot of turbulence due to their dated, 1970s-style bungalow. Nigel quickly fell for their rural locations incredible views, but Catherine has never loved the place and misses having neighbours, so Phil searches for a home that pleases them both, offering room for Nigels beloved chickens, while giving Catherine more people around her

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: The planners agree that renovation can now extend into the adjacent barn, Anty Johns is set to become a four-bedroom family home, heaping even more pressure on builder Richard. Desperate to shore up the buildings precarious foundations, his crew race to finish the concrete floor. Amanda and historian Derek head off to meet distant Clarkson relative Dorothy, eager to hunt down any leads relating to former resident Anthony Clarksons elusive diaries

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcets disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasnt eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sarah, 35, arrives at Kings College Hospital concerned that a brain tumour she first had as a teenager has returned. Helen, 47, is worried about her baby son James, who was born with a hole in his heart and one kidney, and has been vomiting since the morning, while 28-year-old Wayne seeks treatment for knife wounds to his leg after he tried to stop someone stealing his girlfriends phone

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a young woman whos had a panic attack while driving to work and pulls over in the middle of rush-hour traffic. An elderly woman who feared her sons van was being broken into rushes outside and slips on the driveway. A man in a community centre who speaks very little English is having chest pains. Hes on medication for a previous heart attack but has not renewed his prescription

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcets disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasnt eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.desc: Sarah, 35, arrives at Kings College Hospital concerned that a brain tumour she first had as a teenager has returned. Helen, 47, is worried about her baby son James, who was born with a hole in his heart and one kidney, and has been vomiting since the morning, while 28-year-old Wayne seeks treatment for knife wounds to his leg after he tried to stop someone stealing his girlfriends phone

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: For the last day in Porto, horse-loving Louise from Walkington takes her rivals riding - but not everyone is keen to saddle up. In the evening, she organises a walking tour of the city, after which the favourite is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to Lynton in north Devon, where they stay at Alistair and Emma Mundells four-star Castle Hill Guesthouse. The pair only opened the BandB three months prior to the competition, and hope to impress with their recently renovated rooms, but Brigitte Tee proves hard to win over. Two of their guests are also forced to overcome their fears during a trip on a Victorian cliff railway

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, Henry Cole finds an unusual three-wheeled motorbike and Simon OBrien unearths an old projector screen that he wants to turn into a work of art

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lorraine and Jon want to fulfil their long-held dream of owning a house among the white-washed mountain villages of Axarquía in Spain. With a budget of £110,000, Jean Johansson is able to show them five attractive options, but will they love any of them enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, the first host, company director Sue, promises an evening her guests will never forget. Joining her are business guru Marc, teaching assistant Kim, manager Paul and mole catcher Michael. Sue hopes to get things off to a great start, but when her starter reminds Kim of baby food and Marc of toilets, things begin to look bleak

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, business guru Marc intends to use his coaching skills to plan an impressive night, but after annoying his fellow diners, he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teaching assistant Kim hopes to win over her guests with a summer holiday-themed evening, as she hosts the third dinner party of the week in the West Midlands

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: College manager and part-time comedian Paul is the fourth to play host in the West Midlands, turning his home into a pub in the hope of pulling in the points by pulling a few pints

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in the West Midlands, mole-catcher Michael serves up fancy French cuisine. However, he faces an uphill battle after he chooses a controversial main course, and one of his guests vomits before theyve even started eating. Its an eventful evening, with bizarre butlers, self-penned songs and animal antics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Brook Meadow, near Market Harborough in Leicestershire. Host Claire is banking on the appeal of her interior design skills and picturesque location

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Apollo Inn in Barlborough, where host James claims his poached eggs are the best in the business - and there are certainly no complaints at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers head to The Swan Inn in Letton, Herefordshire, run by Luke and best friend Heather. Their freshly renovated coaching inn has expectations high, and the guests are impressed by how sparklingly new everything is. Disappointment is the order of the day at breakfast, though, when the guests are left out in the cold by the continental offering

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steph and Martin welcome the BandBers to White Mark Glamping in Watlington, Oxfordshire. Some of their guests arent quick to embrace the great outdoors, especially upon discovering the communal shower blocks and lack of electrics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its payment day, and time for the BandBers to settle some scores and find out how much theyve been paid. programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge drone and aerial photography to reveal Britains country houses and palaces from a new perspective, capturing breathtaking architecture, formal gardens and sweeping parklands in extraordinary detail. Beginning with Blenheim Palace in Oxfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Kevin, 57, arrives at Kings College Hospital in London with breathing difficulties, having fallen off a ladder onto a metal bar, while 11-year-old Archie has cut his lip in an accident at school and is worried about stitches. Elsewhere, a drink-related fall has left 53-year-old John with a head injury, and barman Ross, 31, needs treatment for a fractured eye socket following an alcohol-fuelled night out

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old mechanical engineer Graham is rushed into Kings College Hospital in south London with a suspected heart attack, and after his brother reminisces about their carefree youth, the doctor suggests Grahams problems may be related to his more recent stressful lifestyle. Meanwhile, 71-year-old Pat is found unconscious by her husband, and 65-year-old Mick is discovered lying in the street with blood coming out of his ear. In both cases, the medics suspect brain haemorrhages, so scans are required
