programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whos passed out for the third time that day, and a man in his 40s with chest pain and a family history of heart failure that could be causing him anxiety. A man is found intoxicated and collapsed in the street, and a woman trips on some stairs and badly cuts her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is rushed in with suspected sepsis and his wife shares her experience as his full-time carer. Sixty-one-year-old Jillian comes in after a fall and recalls when her husband was diagnosed with stage four bowel cancer. Keith arrives with a fast heart rate and while staff urgently try to bring it down his wife talks about raising deaf children and being diagnosed with the deaf gene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. Twenty year-old Kate is rushed in after collapsing in a nightclub and having to receive CPR from a friend when she stopped breathing normally. In the Urgent Treatment Unit 19 year-old Pavni and 21-year-old Sarah meet while waiting for treatment after what they suspect to be needle-spiking. While being treated Pavni talks about the racist abuse she faced growing up and Sarah reveals the impact COVID-19 has had on her university experience

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Blackburn chemistry teacher and self-confessed culture-vulture Shabaz leads his rivals on a tour of Portos historical sights, before a performance of fado - melancholy Portuguese music that looks set to give the others the blues

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brigitte Tee, who runs four-star BandB Gorse Meadow in the New Forest, hosts the first round of the competition. Her guests are initially charmed by her eccentric personality, but the discovery of a bathroom window in need of repair and another room containing ladybirds, cobwebs and dust soon takes the shine off their stay

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Suffolk, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet former agony aunt Janet, whose garden shed is crammed with goodies. With no motors to unearth, Henry makes a rare furniture discovery, while Simon finds a vintage tram bench

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Andi and Neil from York, who dream of retiring permanently to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Theyre looking for a three-bedroom house with a dog-friendly garden, where barbeque enthusiast Neil can cook up a storm close to the beach close to the coastal town of Mazarron, near Murcia. Laura has five sizzling options for their budget of £145,000, but will any of them turn out to be their new forever home?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests shes hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neils very own creation, head in a jar, its proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Swan Inn, in Midhurst, West Sussex, where guests enjoy an alfresco breakfast in the market square - and encounter a shocking hidden cupboard

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The battling BandB owners visit Osterley Park Hotel in Isleworth, where owner Sunny Pharroda reveals that hospitality was not his first career, leading to some tough questions about his suitability as a host. To make matters worse, as the guests prepare for bed, one contestant makes an early checkout

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals turn up at Plover Cottage in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, where they are amazed by the space, although Liz and Gary find more than they bargained for in their room and the self-catering conditions are a concern for some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Forge Guest Rooms in Long Whatton, Leicestershire, owned by Liz and Gary Scottorn. The guests love the luxury, but Cleide questions eating breakfast beside a hot tub. In the evening, theres drama over drinks as Sunny causes Liz to defend her levels of cleanliness. At breakfast, Sunny isnt sure how to work the cooking facilities. Cleide and John feel cramped eating croissants leading to consternation come feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Criticisms and comments are all laid bare, as Digby reveals how much he paid for a room he didnt even spend the night in. Cleide also defends her decision not to offer welcome packs on arrival. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is finally announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Norfolk to take on the restoration of an under-rated French hot hatch - a 1997 Peugeot 106 Rallye. The car belongs to 21-year-old student Senna, who comes from a family of petrolheads

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend pick up a 1972 Renault Alpine A110 rally racer belonging to a former Italian restaurateur who has owned it for 20 years but never actually driven it

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of first-time buyers who are struggling to find homes. In Southampton, Jenny and Tom are keen to move out of their cramped rental property and into a house of their own, but they are facing fierce competition and a fast market. Meanwhile, in the New Forest, Georgie and Will are desperate to live together after seven years of being a couple. However, with Will working in Belgium during the week, the pair are finding suitable properties are snapped up before they have even had the chance to view them

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Larne in Northern Ireland with Catherine and Nigel Finch, who have been married for seven years, but lately have hit a spot of turbulence due to their dated, 1970s-style bungalow. Nigel quickly fell for their rural locations incredible views, but Catherine has never loved the place and misses having neighbours, so Phil searches for a home that pleases them both, offering room for Nigels beloved chickens, while giving Catherine more people around her

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: The planners agree that renovation can now extend into the adjacent barn, Anty Johns is set to become a four-bedroom family home, heaping even more pressure on builder Richard. Desperate to shore up the buildings precarious foundations, his crew race to finish the concrete floor. Amanda and historian Derek head off to meet distant Clarkson relative Dorothy, eager to hunt down any leads relating to former resident Anthony Clarksons elusive diaries

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcets disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasnt eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sarah, 35, arrives at Kings College Hospital concerned that a brain tumour she first had as a teenager has returned. Helen, 47, is worried about her baby son James, who was born with a hole in his heart and one kidney, and has been vomiting since the morning, while 28-year-old Wayne seeks treatment for knife wounds to his leg after he tried to stop someone stealing his girlfriends phone

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a young woman whos had a panic attack while driving to work and pulls over in the middle of rush-hour traffic. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, the first host, company director Sue, promises an evening her guests will never forget. programme.title: The Cure for Hate: Bearing Witness to Auschwitz
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on former skinhead and Holocaust denier Tony McAleer, who went on to become a founding member of the anti-hate activist group Life After Hate. Profoundly aware and deeply ashamed of the lineage of hate he once promoted, Tony visits the Auschwitz-Birkenau death camp in Poland in the spirit of tshuvah - to bear witness to the inconceivable ravages of the Holocaust, repent his wrongs, and deepen his personal work against the rise of extremist politics. Film-maker Peter Hutchison documents McAleers profoundly personal journey of atonement at Auschwitz

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: World-weary detective inspector John Rebus goes on the trail of a copycat serial killer, only to be taken off the case pending an inquiry into the death of a convicted murderer he helped put behind bars 15 years earlier. Crime drama based on the books by best-selling author Ian Rankin, starring John Hannah, Jim Norton, Ewan Stewart, Sara Stewart and Joanna Roth

programme.title: Lucan
programme.desc: The body of Sandra Rivett was discovered on November 7, 1974, and the chief suspect was Richard John Bingham, seventh earl of Lucan, the father of the children that Rivett was employed to care for as nanny. However, the earl disappeared and was never brought to justice. Thirty years after the event, Hampshire builder Neil Berriman discovered he was Sandra Rivetts biological son and began a search for the truth about the murder of his birth mother

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew shares more of her conversation with Tyra Banks. Sunny Anderson is hitting the headlines with Drew and Ross Mathews

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew shares more of her conversation with Stephen and Evie Colbert who join Drew in the kitchen to make something from their cookbook

programme.title: Life and Death Row
programme.desc: The documentary follows the final few weeks of the appeals process in Texas as Ramiro Gonzales desperately tries to have his execution overturned, while the family of his victims seek justice. In 2006, Ramiro Gonzales received the death penalty for kidnapping, raping and murdering a former classmate, 18-year-old Bridget Townsend, but in his appeals process, his supporters argue that the human brain only matures by a persons mid-twenties and he has now become a man of deep religious faith

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes
programme.desc: The story of the bloody battle for Normandy that followed D-Day, narrated by soldiers on both sides and French witnesses, whose words are lip-synced by actors. Despite the hard-won foothold made on the coast, the Allies still faced their greatest challenge. As the British and the Americans respectively tried to take Caen and Cherbourg, Nazi troops began a regime of counterattacks, leaving the Allies bogged down amid the dense Normandy hedgerows

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viv cant handle the truth, Leanne tells a lie to be kind and Maeve thinks twice about a boyfriend

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tanes world is turned upside down. Can Jo really trust her new boyfriend? Cash fears for his friend

programme.title: Cheap European Homes
programme.desc: Maggie Molloy, Kevin McGahern and James Kavanagh embark on a journey across Europe as they help aspiring homeowners find properties at unbeatable prices. Roisin and her dad Bobby from County Clare are planning to relocate full-time to Portugal. Priced out of the Irish market and seeking a sunnier lifestyle, Roisin is searching for a waterside fixer-upper they can transform together, putting Bobbys decades of renovation experience to good use

programme.title: The Hills Are Alive: A Year at Kylemore Abbey
programme.desc: Cameras spend 12 months documenting life inside Kylemore Abbey, an iconic heritage site in Ireland run by Benedictine nuns

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Freddy complains about being treated like a child, Frasier suggests that he help with repairs around the apartment, but things get more complicated. Sitcom revival starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: The life of Jeffrey Rignall, one of Gacys few surviving victims, is chronicled. The killers execution day causes massive protests and reunions as victims family members and those who worked the case seek closure, and Amirante tries to move on.

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Attempting to improve her dating record, Jesse, 22, from Meath meets fellow student nurse Michael, 23, from Laois. Bus driver and dedicated ladies man Ronan, 61, from Drogheda meets Sharon, 56, from Dublin. And aspiring entertainer Kate, 32, from Kildare takes to the stage with stand-up comic James, 34, also from Dublin

programme.title: Shortscreen
programme.desc: A young dad in rural Ireland must face his anxiety around gender and bullying when his baby is born intersex

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: In a bid to get her granddaughter off her case, Joan advises Alma to have some fun as her low self-esteem is affecting her posture. Alma gets a job at Leannes bar and meets a potential love interest, but neither goes to plan. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: Spent
programme.desc: A flashback to 2014 show Mia at the height of her powers, and her spending, while a visit from Jo reveals that their friendship is complicated. In the present, Mia drives a wedge between the two as she raises suspicions about Jos fiance. Elsewhere, Mia needs convincing to pawn her expensive watch and save her dad Teddy from eviction

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viv questions everything, Jack takes a hit and Leanne wades in

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Harpers guilt surges, Cash struggles with the rules, and Sonnys frustration gets the better of him

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts.

programme.title: Coming Home: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Europes rarest and most reclusive animals had once all but disappeared from Central Europe, but lynx, minks, pond turtles, and ground squirrels are being reintroduced

programme.title: Irelands Perfect Pubs
programme.desc: Anna Clifford takes a trip to Sligo to visit the Beach Bar, a pub hideaway and surfers paradise. Joining her for a pint is fellow comedian Adam Kelly, also known as 2BigLugs

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: The queen wants a property to secure her future, while a foes status grows, and Jeanne entangles the cardinal in her plot. Drama, starring Emilia Schule and Louis Cunningham

programme.title: RFDS: Royal Flying Doctor Service
programme.desc: Wayne, Pete and Mira attend to a critically ill baby while Eliza visits a patient requesting help with voluntary assisted dying

programme.title: Line of Duty
programme.desc: Gail Vellas murder is linked to a historic case of police corruption, and Kate hatches a plan to tell once and for all if Jo is bent. They are closer than ever to cracking the case, but when Hastings authority is undermined, it leaves his team in a potentially dangerous situation. Starring Vicky McClure, Kelly Macdonald and Adrian Dunbar

programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Exploring the halcyon days of radio, when Michael OHehir visualised scores and score-settling for those gathered around the wireless. A controversial overseas odyssey saw the All-Ireland final travel to New York while, back in Ireland, new visions from Northern Ireland sweep away the southern order and bring the Sam Maguire across the border for the very first time

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes

programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company

programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones

Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon enlists the help of an unexpected ally, Daenerys makes a difficult decision in Mereen, Brienne searches for Sansa, and Theon remains under Ramsays control

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya continues her training at the House of Black and White, Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers and the Sand Snakes mount an attack. Fantasy, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon prepares for conflict, Sansa tries to talk to Theon, and Brienne waits for a sign. Elsewhere, Jaime attempts to reconnect with his family

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya makes progress in her training, Sansa confronts an old friend, Cersei faces a struggle and Jon embarks on a journey. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Meanwhile, in Braavos, Arya runs into a familiar face and Mace Tyrell visits the Iron Bank, and against her better judgement Daenerys hosts a traditional Meereenese celebration of athleticism. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow and his militant followers appear to have made an indelible mark on Kings Landing as Cersei finds herself seeking forgiveness. Meanwhile, in the North, Stannis embarks on a gruelling march, and Jon is challenged, and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is surrounded by strangers as the fifth chapter of the hit fantasy drama draws to a close. Starring Kit Harington, Emilia Clarke, Lena Headey and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fate of Jon Snow is revealed, Ramsay sends his dogs after Theon and Sansa, while Ellaria and the Sand Snakes make their move

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras struggles to balance work and home life and must make a choice when he is tempted by an offer that goes against his morals

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council, while Viserys is urged to secure the succession through a new marriage and Daemon announces his intentions

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder, while the realm celebrates Aegons second nameday and Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her search for a suitable match, while Daemon returns to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the king. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale, while Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons, and Alicent seeks the truth about the princess

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. Apprentice deckhand Logan has to decide whether a life at sea is the right choice for him and his family, and seafood seller Jenny receives a surprise on her 65th birthday

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Bran trains with the Three-Eyed Raven, while in the north of Westeros at Castle Black, the Nights Watch stands behind Alliser Thorne. Fantasy drama, starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright and Owen Teale

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: While Daenerys meets her future, Bran meets the past. Elsewhere, Tommen confronts the High Sparrow, and Arya continues her training. Starring Emilia Clarke, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead-Wright

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fantasy drama continues as Tyrion strikes a deal, while Jorah and Daario undertake a difficult task as they seek to catch up with Daenerys. Back across the Narrow Sea, Jaime and Cersei try to improve their situation. Starring Peter Dinklage, Iain Glen, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions agenda in Slavers Bay sees him seeking a new, strange ally. In the North, Brienne goes on a mission, while in Braavos, Arya is given a chance to prove herself. Beyond the Wall, Bran makes progress with his mystical tuition, learning a great deal in the process. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Gwendoline Christie, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead Wright

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: An old foe returns to the great game, and Arya faces a difficult choice. Meanwhile, Gilly is given a chance to discover whether Lord Randyll Tarly lives up to his formidable reputation as she meets Sams family, and Jaime puts himself at odds with the Faith Militant as he faces off with the High Sparrow. Fantasy drama, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, John Bradley, Hannah Murray and Maisie Williams

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow eyes another target, Jaime confronts a hero, and Olenna Tyrell plans to leave Kings Landing. Meanwhile, Arya makes a plan

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: As Jaime weighs up his options, Cersei answers a request, and Tyrions plans bear fruit. Starring Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: As the Starks prepare to fight, Davos loses something dear, while Ramsay plays a game and Daenerys faces a choice

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: As Cersei awaits judgement, Walder Frey and Jaime celebrate at Riverrun. Meanwhile, winter finally arrives. Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke star

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon organises the Norths defences, Cersei tries to even the odds, Daenerys comes home and Arya reminds the Freys that the North remembers. Sam adapts to life in Oldtown, and the Night King makes his way south

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys receives an unexpected visitor, while Jon faces resistance and Tyrion plans the conquest of Westeros. Cersei gathers her allies, Arya has a reunion with old friends and Sam risks his career and life

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon arrives at Dragonstone and finally meets Daenerys, but refuses her demand that he bend the knee to her. Cersei gains a new ally, Sansa receives an unexpected visitor and Sam is confronted for his actions

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Naomi and Suzie attend visionary director Hal Holloways press night, where they cross paths with Carters glamorous wife, Genevieve

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Finally coming to terms with her situation, Suzie decides to take control of her life by becoming the narrator of her own story

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Now a decade older, Rhaenyra navigates continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena consider an offer from Pentos. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As the families descend on Driftmark for a funeral, King Viserys calls for an end to infighting between members of the Great Houses. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Six years later, the succession plans for Driftmark become critical, and Rhaenyra tries to strike a bargain with Rhaenys

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists help to track down Aegon, members of the Great Houses of Westeros are asked to affirm their allegiance

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries desperately to hold the realm together and Daemon prepares for war. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Paul arrives at Ginas office, nervously awaiting the verdict of the court hearing into his part in Alexs suicide. As they discuss the traumatic events he has been through over the past year, he reveals he wants to leave therapy - and though he tries to make excuses, Gina believes she knows the real reason for his decision. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Dianne Wiest

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya returns to Winterfell and is reunited with Sansa and Bran, while Daenerys takes matters into her own hands and launches a surprise attack on the Lannister army. Jaime and Bronn collect the spoils from the war with the Tyrells

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys demands loyalty from the surviving Lannister soldiers and makes an offer to the lords of Westeros, while Jon heeds Brans warning about white walkers on the move. Cersei vows to vanquish anyone or anything that stands in her way

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Winterfell, Littlefinger schemes to isolate Sansa, while tensions between Arya and her ssister increase after the discovery of a letter. Jon and his men go beyond the wall to capture a white walker, while Daenerys has to make a tough decision

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. But their quest is hindered by Soviet agents who also want the fabled object for a more sinister purpose. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League (2015)
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis (2018)
programme.desc: Siren steals the Book of Legends to locate the Trident of Atlantis so she can reign supreme over the ocean. Animation with the voice of Yvette Nicole Brown

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3 (2024)
programme.desc: The blue hedgehog, Knuckles and Tails reunite to face the might of the villainous Shadow, who possesses powers unlike anything they have seen before. Outmuscled on every front, Sonic seeks help from an unlikely source, Dr Ivo Robotnik. Fantasy adventure sequel based on the videogame, starring Jim Carrey, James Marsden and Tika Sumpter

programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders (2016)
programme.desc: When their fiendish foes unite against them once more, Batman and Robin attempt to take them down. Animated adventure, with the voices of Adam West, Burt Ward and Julie Newmar, reprising their roles from the 1960s live action series

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts (2015)
programme.desc: The dark knight joins forces with a team of superheroes including Green Arrow and The Flash to battle the mastermind behind a horse of deadly robotic animals. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Chris Diamantopoulos

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Police 24/7
programme.desc: A traffic stop for improper use of the centre lane turns into a chase and a 911 call leads to officers helping a woman who stabbed herself

programme.title: QPR: The Four Year Plan
programme.desc: An insight into the running of Queens Park Rangers football club, as cameras were given unprecedented access to the boardroom and the first team. In 2007, the club was facing relegation from the Championship as well as financial ruin, before being bought by F1 supremo Bernie Ecclestone and Italian businessman Flavio Briatore. Soon after, they were joined on the board by Indian steel magnate Lakshmi Mittal, and together the new owners promised a return to glory for the club and its supporters

programme.title: Transhood (2020)
programme.desc: Filmed over five years in Kansas City, this documentary follows four kids - beginning at ages 4, 7, 12, and 15 - as they redefine coming of age

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of producer and actor John Singleton, whose name came to prominence with the 1991 crime drama Boyz n the Hood, which he wrote and directed. He was the first African-American person to be nominated for Best Director at the Academy Awards

programme.title: Celtics City
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of the Boston Celtics basketball team from their formation in 1946 to a record 18th NBA championship in the 2023-24 season. This edition reveals how the Celtics become an NBA dynasty, but racial tensions in Boston and beyond augured a turbulent era ahead

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the Welsh actor, who was 13 when he starred in Empire of the Sun and has since played Bruce Wayne in Christopher Nolans Batman films and won an Oscar for The Fighter

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of director Christopher Nolan, whose films include Memento, Insomnia, the Dark Knight trilogy, The Prestige, Inception, Interstellar, Dunkirk and Tenet

programme.title: The Movies
programme.sub-title: The Golden Age of Cinema - Part One
programme.desc: The history of cinema, told through interviews and analysis from some of its greatest directors and talents. The first of a two-part examination of its so-called golden age begins in the 1930s, as talking pictures take hold in Hollywood

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.sub-title: The Valley of the Shadow of Death
programme.desc: The series of battles that pitted generals Ulysses S Grant and Robert E Lee against each other, from the Wilderness to Petersburg in Virginia. In 1864, a 30-day period saw the two sides suffer more losses of life than either had endured in three years of war. As the casualty list increased, Lincolns chances of re-election began to dim, and with them the prospect of a Union victory

programme.title: The Sixties
programme.desc: A look at how American culture was changed by the Beatles and the new wave of British bands and artists that followed

programme.title: Ice on Fire (2019)
programme.desc: Documentary produced by Leonardo DiCaprio focusing on many never-before-seen solutions designed to slow down the escalating environmental crisis. The film goes beyond the current climate change narrative and offers hope that humans can actually stave off the worst effects of global warming

programme.title: Bobby Robson: More Than a Manager (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the career of the much-loved former England, Barcelona and Newcastle United manager. Via the Hand of God and Paul Gascoignes tears, to titles across Europe, Robson overcame the most extreme challenges - including fighting for his life after being diagnosed with cancer - before returning to football to manage his beloved Newcastle

programme.title: Discovering Film

programme.title: The Directors

programme.title: The Movies
programme.sub-title: The Golden Age of Cinema - Part One
programme.desc: The history of cinema, told through interviews and analysis from some of its greatest directors and talents. The first of a two-part examination of its so-called golden age begins in the 1930s, as talking pictures take hold in Hollywood

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.sub-title: The Valley of the Shadow of Death
programme.desc: The series of battles that pitted generals Ulysses S Grant and Robert E Lee against each other, from the Wilderness to Petersburg in Virginia. In 1864, a 30-day period saw the two sides suffer more losses of life than either had endured in three years of war. As the casualty list increased, Lincolns chances of re-election began to dim, and with them the prospect of a Union victory

programme.title: The Wimbledon Kidnapping
programme.desc: A look back at the mysterious disappearance of Muriel McKay in Wimbledon in 1969, as well as the trial of the first kidnap and ransom case in Britain

programme.title: Beware the Slenderman
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the true story of how The Slenderman, a figure born from internet memes, became a focal point in an attempted murder investigation involving two 12-year-old girls, Morgan Geyser and Anissa Weier. The two girls lured their friend into the woods, stabbed her 19 times, and confessed that they committed the horrific act to appease a tall and faceless man online, known as The Slenderman

programme.title: Ali and Cavett: The Tale of the Tapes
programme.desc: Documentary showcasing the life and times of Muhammad Ali, as shown through the lens of his numerous appearances on The Dick Cavett Show

programme.title: Seve
programme.desc: Discover the story of golfer Severiano Ballesteros, told by his brothers and contemporary players

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: In 2010, the North Yorkshire village of Melsonby was left in shock when postmistress Diana Garbutt was found murdered in the post office she ran with her husband Robin. He claimed shed been the victim of a violent intruder, but as detectives probed further, suspicion began to fall on him and he was convicted of her murder and sentenced to life in prison in 2011. This documentary re-examines the case, featuring interviews with those convinced Robin was wrongfully convicted and others who are unsure and still suspect he is guilty

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: At trial, the prosecution alleges Robin was stealing from the Post Office and evidence from the Horizon computer system is a key part of the case against him

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: Robin is sentenced to 20 years, but key evidence is missing, with none of his DNA on the murder weapon and data from the Horizon system unable be trusted

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Dark Marvels: Killing Machines

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: An unidentified metal object is found on Kiska Island, while a centuries-old gold mining mystery is investigated. In Siberia, a network of ice tunnels is explored, while fossils unearthed in the Canadian Arctic lead to the discovery of a new species

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: An expedition on Europes tallest mountain unearthes a decapitated human body and experts uncover a mummified Russian Second World War soldier near a wartime shelter. Plus, in Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated

programme.desc: The case against King John, also known as John Lackland, who had a reputation for being a cruel and treacherous ruler. He was known for his ruthlessness, including the deaths of his nephew and the imprisonment and starvation of others

programme.sub-title: Indiana Ivy and the Temple of Phlegm
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod find their way back to the auction with the help of some pocket technology. Casey bails herself out despite being confined with an infectious German, while Ivy scoops up finds. Darrell seems set to lose his title The King of Montebello

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary needs help managing a tiny parking lot in Van Nuys, California. Ivy goes on the prowl for a bike, while Dave scores a therapeutic locker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do some heavy lifting, and Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: We Dont Use the S Word Around Here
programme.desc: The buyers journey to Buena Park, California, for the next round of auctions. Brandi and Jarrod thinks they may have done the best of what looks to be a bad lot of units, while Kenny goes through a unit he wins that looks to be half-decent

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Norman Panic Room and a Mesolithic Fish Trap
programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of York Castle, built on the orders of William the Conqueror and once the regional seat of British government. The castle has also been used as a prison and a royal mint, and in 1308, 25 Knights Templar were jailed there and examined on charges of heresy, idolatry and other crimes. The castle was also where Dick Turpin was held prior to his execution in 1739 and Dan tries to separate fact from fiction regarding the many myths to have developed about the infamous highwayman

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house and a Georgian mansion. Its last owner, Lady Olive Baillie, made it a centre of lavish hospitality for leading politicians, international royalty and film stars. When she died in 1974, she bequeathed the castle and grounds to a specially created charitable trust so that future generations could enjoy her home

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Lancaster Castle has witnessed scenes of historical, cultural and political significance throughout the centuries, including incidents of religious persecution, the trials of the Lancashire Witches and 200 public executions. Owned by the Duchy of Lancaster, it was a state prison until 2011 and is still a working crown court. Dan Jones explores its turbulent history and meets Wendy Robinson, a retired prosecutor from Australia, whose ancestors were sentenced to death at Lancaster Crown Court in 1817 for stealing sheep

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Arundel Castle, in West Sussex, has been the seat of the Dukes of Norfolk and their ancestors for over 850 years, with its fortunes rising and falling with those of the Howard family. A particularly low point occured when Thomas Howard, the fourth Duke of Norfolk, was executed by Elizabeth I for allegedly plotting to marry her rival Mary Queen of Scots. Dan Jones meets a weapons expert, who shows him how Richard FitzAlan, the third Earl of Arundel, would have fought in the 100 Years War. He also meets a social historian, who gives an insight into how Arundel would have prepared for Queen Victorias visit in 1846

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Detroit, rock n roll legend Jack White unveils his needle-in-a-haystack quest to track down a historic one-of-a-kind recording trailer thats been absent for decades

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The team faces the cold to turn a snowmobiles blades into a kukri knife, before the last two fight to forge an intricate sacrificial sword

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Norman Panic Room and a Mesolithic Fish Trap
programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.title: Secret Sex Lives Of Tyrants
programme.desc: Examining the sexual power plays, obsessions and abuses that influenced former President of Cuba, Fidel Castros reign - and sometimes the fate of nations

programme.title: Historys Most Shocking
programme.sub-title: The Hindenburg Disaster, Pilots Ejection Fail, When Trees Attack and Stuck in a Cave
programme.desc: Analysis of four distinct events - the historic 1937 Hindenburg airship disaster, a pilots successful ejection during a difficult landing, a motorists fight for survival from a falling forest and a cavers struggle to escape a confined space

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house and a Georgian mansion. Its last owner, Lady Olive Baillie, made it a centre of lavish hospitality for leading politicians, international royalty and film stars. When she died in 1974, she bequeathed the castle and grounds to a specially created charitable trust so that future generations could enjoy her home

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Lancaster Castle has witnessed scenes of historical, cultural and political significance throughout the centuries, including incidents of religious persecution, the trials of the Lancashire Witches and 200 public executions. Owned by the Duchy of Lancaster, it was a state prison until 2011 and is still a working crown court. Dan Jones explores its turbulent history and meets Wendy Robinson, a retired prosecutor from Australia, whose ancestors were sentenced to death at Lancaster Crown Court in 1817 for stealing sheep

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Arundel Castle, in West Sussex, has been the seat of the Dukes of Norfolk and their ancestors for over 850 years, with its fortunes rising and falling with those of the Howard family. A particularly low point occured when Thomas Howard, the fourth Duke of Norfolk, was executed by Elizabeth I for allegedly plotting to marry her rival Mary Queen of Scots. Dan Jones meets a weapons expert, who shows him how Richard FitzAlan, the third Earl of Arundel, would have fought in the 100 Years War. He also meets a social historian, who gives an insight into how Arundel would have prepared for Queen Victorias visit in 1846

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Theres No Crying in Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum tries to put his best foot forward when a Nike Lebron shoe hits the counter, while Rick keeps a close watch on a seller who comes in with a signed Pulp Fiction poster. Corey might be in over his head when Jim Henson sculptures float his way

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Detroit, rock n roll legend Jack White unveils his needle-in-a-haystack quest to track down a historic one-of-a-kind recording trailer thats been absent for decades

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel shakes things up by taking on a custom vintage vehicle project for a Hollywood picture car coordinator

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Its D-Day for the Clermont Diggers - they have just 48 hours to repay investor Dennis. Meanwhile, Robs gold haul is washed down the river

programme.desc: A group of prospectors searches for gold in some of Australias most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as price for attaining a fortune. programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A prop from the movie Cleopatra and a 1922 silver peace dollar make for an interesting day at the Gold and Silver pawn shop

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick rocks out when a seller brings in a blazer worn by the Rolling Stones Keith Richards. Chum brings out his inner warrior when a Japanese Samurai mask hits the counter. Meanwhile, Corey tries to paint a picture-perfect deal when a Norman Rockwell autograph comes into the shop

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Its all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Marys fraternisation with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later. Meanwhile, Kenny looks for anything in his locker that can wash off that storage scent

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas ladies show up in Bourgie Brea, and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head to head on a giant pair of sister lockers, though Dave then chooses to sit out the rest of the time

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr run the operation. Kenny feels run down and his lack of focus lands him a locker - though theres a pleasant surprise in the end. Mary, Shana and Edwina just cannot seem to make anything stick, so decide to embrace it, doing what they do best.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy with a Chance of Profit
programme.desc: Its a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he enjoys a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang, while Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the east of England. The presenters visit Norwich Castle Museum, where they find out about developments at Must Farm in Cambridgeshire, a hunt for Roman treasure in Colchester, a burial site at Abington, an Anglo-Saxon royal hall at Lyminge, the 16th-century Tudor Basing House, and a dig involving Emperor Nero at Silchester

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Tim Tate combs through previously top-secret government files which disclose the details of extensive military, spy agency and police investigations into the paranormal

programme.title: Secrets in the Sand
programme.sub-title: Lady Be Good Wreck and The GoBekli Tepe Calendar
programme.desc: Extraordinary curiosities that were once concealed within the planets desert sands, only to be finally brought to light by the elements themselves

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: To take on the deepest wrecks in Scapa Flow, Ross needs to successfully navigate decompression training before heading out with local dive guide Emily Turton to dive on one of the biggest of the Kaiser?s Imperial war ships from the First World War, SMS Karlsruhe. As he explores the eerie relic, Ross tries to understand how and why the German fleet ended up on the Scottish seabed, when they had already surrendered months earlier. Having resolved one enduring mystery, he then heads 600 miles south to meet with ex-serviceman Mark Culwick and dive on an experimental British aircraft carrier submarine built in the 1920s called the M2. This unique vessel was lost in shocking circumstances, with all hands. During his dive Ross starts to understand the horrifying truth ofexactly how and why the 60 men on board never came home

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor is joined by advanced technical diver Emily Turton in north Devon, as he prepares to dive down on the wreck of a sunken steam ship. Iona II was heading to America in the early 1860s, when it went down with a mystery cargo on board that the owners went to extensive efforts to recover in secret. The pair embark on a night dive with the hope it will reveal what the owners so desperately tried to covertly retrieve. Determined to get to the bottom of the mystery, Ross also meets with a maritime historian who has uncovered Iona IIs shocking purpose. Ross and maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas head to Plymouth to dive on a newly discovered wreck, and to uncover a staggering artefact that links the site to one of the most controversial and censored periods in British history - the transatlantic slave trade

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania preservationist opens the doors to his jaw-dropping historic properties. The Wolfe brothers sift through a rockstar pickers off-limits collection

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: A dangerous slip-up reminds the contestants not to play with sharp objects as they make knives from old toys and recreate an iconic American blade

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath explores creepy dolls and a haunted hearse at Nottinghams macabre museum with Dr Kate Cherrell. Kate visits the National Justice Museum, a 17th-century courthouse and prison that may still house the spirits of former inmates. Meanwhile, Andy heads to one of Britains oldest pubs, where he learns how an unpaid bar tab contributed to the legend of a cursed galleon. Later, he embarks on a quest to find evidence that Robin Hood, Nottinghamshires legendary hero, may have been more than just a myth

programme.desc: Documentary following daily life at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset, where staff look after monkeys, chimps, orangutans and other primates

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Documentary following daily life at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset, where staff look after monkeys, chimps, orangutans and other primates

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: Zambias Kafue National Park is an elephant heaven. Here, rescuers teach a herd of orphans the skills they need to make friends in the wild

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Super-smart Tulia and Zalipa go missing from Palas Island and the race is on to find them before they get into trouble

programme.title: Into the Wild: India
programme.desc: Many power battles await a Tibetan wild stallion as it follows a female herd for the chance to sire the next generation

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim (2024)
programme.desc: Helm Hammerhand sits on the throne of Rohan, flanked by sons Hama and Haleth and rebellious daughter Hera. Dunlending lord Freca proposes a marital union between Hera and his son Wulf, which Helm loudly rejects. In a subsequent brawl between fathers, Helm unintentionally lands a fatal blow, so Wulf vows revenge and amasses an army led by General Targg. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Gaia Wise, Brian Cox, Luke Pasqualino and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: The Big Chill (1983)
programme.desc: Seven old friends are reunited when they gather for the funeral of a former fellow college student. Over the course of a weekend together, they reflect on the dead mans demise and how their attitudes to life have changed since they last met, reminiscing on the faded idealism of youth. Drama, starring Glenn Close, Tom Berenger, Kevin Kline, Jeff Goldblum, William Hurt and Meg Tilly

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite (2004)
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: Big Daddy (1999)
programme.desc: An immature 32-year-old is heartbroken when his girlfriend walks out on him. In a plan to win her back, he volunteers to look after his flatmates five-year-old son, thus demonstrating he is finally ready to grow up. However, his ideas of childcare prove unconventional and chaos quickly ensues. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Joey Lauren Adams, Jon Stewart, Josh Mostel, Leslie Mann, Rob Schneider and Kristy Swanson, alongside Steve Buscemi in a cameo role

programme.title: Instant Family (2018)
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie (2002)
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his gang of daredevil friends bring the MTV series to the big screen. As usual, they perform a variety of weird and wonderful stunts, including crawling across dozens of mousetraps while wearing rodent make-up, and being rolled down bowling lanes on skateboards. Comedy, with Bam Margera, Henry Rollins, Spike Jonze and Tony Hawk

programme.title: Jackass Number Two (2006)
programme.desc: Another batch of outrageous stunts is lined up by the death-defying friends, who get chased by bulls, used as human shark bait, have leeches attached to their eyes and ride a giant rocket. Comedy sequel, starring Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Steve-O, Chris Pontius and Ryan Dunn

programme.title: Jackass 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Third movie based on the MTV comedy series, in which Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Ryan Dunn and the rest of the fearless team of pranksters embark on even more strange and disturbing stunts, which range from gluing themselves together, enraging dangerous animals and firing an occupied portable toilet from a catapult

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite (2004)
