programme.title: It Takes Two (1996)
programme.desc: Two lookalike youngsters trade places to help resolve each others problems. Childrens comedy, starring Kirstie Alley, Steve Guttenberg and Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods

programme.title: Mousehunt (1997)
programme.desc: Two destitute brothers stand to make a fortune by auctioning off the family home, but before the sale can be finalised they face the task of evicting its resident mouse. However, the resourceful rodent would rather stay put, and outwits their every bungling attempt to oust it. Slapstick comedy, starring Lee Evans, Nathan Lane and Christopher Walken

programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Daddy Day Care (2003)
programme.desc: Two unemployed executives decide to open a day-care centre, believing they have found an easy way to make a profit - but instead discover looking after a horde of rampant kids is not as simple as it seems. Family comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Jeff Garlin, Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days (2003)
programme.desc: A female journalist sets out to demonstrate how women manage to put off prospective partners, and spies the perfect man on whom to test her theories. However, the experiment takes an unexpected turn thanks to her guinea pig, who has a hidden agenda of his own. Romantic comedy, starring Kate Hudson, Matthew McConaughey, Adam Goldberg and Michael Michele

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice (2002)
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.desc: A married couple decide to put some passion back into their dull marriage by filming themselves having sex. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz and Jason Segel

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howards old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldons Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitzs cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howards father, who hasnt made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raja asks Howard and Bernard to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newark

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amys relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurants bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike finds himself in hot water when Molly finds out he purchased Vinces used car, a 1957 Chevy Bel Air, without consulting her first because she thinks they should be saving for the wedding

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike gets caught up in an argument between Molly and her family - and unwittingly makes matters worse. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike is thoroughly spooked when Mollys boss invites them to a costume party at his house on Halloween night, which is a holiday he always dreads. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.sub-title: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball with Zip

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Pineapple and the Bosom of Male Friendship
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis is discharged from hospital, but after returning home he unexpectedly calls a halt to his relationship with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Parasol and a Hell of an Arm
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Raegan Revord and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friends sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls night in making home-made jewellery. Guest starring Bob Newhart, with Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Rajs old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friends sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls night in making home-made jewellery. Guest starring Bob Newhart, with Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: South African-born Linda, her husband Mark and Coco the cat share a one-bedroom floating home on Taggs Island in Hampton, Surrey. Its an idyllic location, but their home is also their workplace and its starting to feel a bit cramped. The couple want to stay put in their exclusive location, so Linda has hatched an ambitious plan to buy the boat next door and do it up all by herself. Its a huge challenge and it remains to be seen whether enthusiasm and passion will be enough to get the job done

programme.desc: A woman demands thousands in payback for a valuable truck; her friend says she traded an antique, hand carved oak table for the vehicle.

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Angela Barnes plays host in this show recorded before a packed house at Londons Hammersmith Apollo, warming up the audience and then introducing routines by fellow comedians Sarah Keyworth and Tim Renkow

programme.title: QI XL
programme.sub-title: All I Want for Christmas is U
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts an extended version of the festive edition of the quiz titled All I Want for Christmas Is U, with Eshaan Akbar, Jo Brand and Jimmy Carr joining regular panellist Alan Davies. The topics cover Santa Clauss whereabouts, why horses make excellent party guests and why there always seems to be room for Christmas pudding

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: David comes up with a new business venture, while Alexis adjusts to her first day of school. Comedy, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: David meets a new friend while setting up his business, Johnny defends Alexiss schoolwork, and Moira deals with a difficult guest at the motel. Comedy, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Moira and Roland find themselves in a compromising situation, while Alexis manages to drive a wedge between David and Patrick. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Davids ex-partner comes to town to do a photoshoot for Moira, while Johnny and Roland think Bob is cheating at poker

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.desc: The comedian examines the appeal of greatest hits albums, the need to set world records, and the abuse of superlatives

programme.title: Cops on the Rock
programme.sub-title: You Dont Get That in the Met
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of the Royal Gibraltar Police, as they deal with everything from cannabis smugglers to cocaine dealers and sinking boats. The drug squad arrest three men for dealing coke and also find hash in a bush at a beauty spot

programme.title: Cops on the Rock
programme.desc: Customs officers rescue a man from the sea at night after he falls from a smugglers boat, and the Drug Squad raid a suspected dealers house

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: A re-tooled grain train springs some leaks, Bernies Streamliner festival faces disaster and the Pichi Richi Explorer takes part in a crazy race in South Australia

programme.title: Rick Steins Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef continues to explore his favourite locations in the Mediterranean, visiting a lagoon in Sardinia where he watches fishermen catching mullet using ancient Roman methods. He also boards a ferry heading for the city of Palermo in Sicily and discovers one of the most impressive pasta dishes of his career

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Money and guns belonging to a cartel are found in a car, an illegal shipment of exotic reptiles is discovered in a van, and a man is caught smuggling medication

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: An armed robber on the run is captured at the border, a drunk driver causes a three-car crash on a bridge, and cocaine is found hidden inside office furniture

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: The presenter goes to work one mile below the North Sea in the last deep mine in Britain, where punishing work, blistering heat, and very real dangers lurk around every corner

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond tackle the traffic chaos snowy weather causes in Britain, and hit upon a solution involving a combine harvester, some rudimentary engineering skills and a trip to Norway. Jeremy also tests the Audi RS5 and the BMW M3, and American actress and model Amber Heard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Jaguar XJ and races against the rotation of the Earth. James May travels to America to drive a Nasa Space Exploration Vehicle and Richard Hammond tests two of the most famous supercars of the 1980s - the Porsche 959 and the Ferrari F40. John Prescott is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate quality produce that needs to be cooked with the respect it deserves, as they continue their culinary journey through time. The duo argue that, while convenience food serves a purpose, only the best ingredients and perfect cooking can produce something truly delicious

programme.title: Rick Steins Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef continues to explore his favourite locations in the Mediterranean, visiting a lagoon in Sardinia where he watches fishermen catching mullet using ancient Roman methods. He also boards a ferry heading for the city of Palermo in Sicily and discovers one of the most impressive pasta dishes of his career

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Festive edition of the award-winning comedy panel show, with actor Jim Broadbent, broadcaster Angela Rippon and comedians Rose Matafeo and Ardal OHanlon joining host Rob Brydon and team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack. As ever, the players reveal amazing stories about themselves - but are they telling the truth or making it all up? programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A dead body is found in the new campus surgery just as Julia is making the finishing touches to the grand opening. Owen feels confused over Diane and Mubbs conflicting advice, while Donna comes to the rescue of a drunken and distraught Mickie, who makes a surprising confession

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Jay persuades Ruth to take part in a job swap so that his grandmother, who has been admitted, will believe he is a doctor rather than a nurse. programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Leo and Abby get ready for the Round the Island yacht race, while Polly reveals she intends to leave Gerald. Maritime drama with the Howard family, starring Maurice Colbourne and Jan Harvey

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu delve into the ultra-competitive world of private tutoring, while a reunion with an old Rada friend, presents Sebastian with a choice about his future that could change everything for the agency. Tamzin Outhwaite guest stars, with Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey and Sharon witness a robbery committed by someone they know, leaving them agonising over whether to turn a blind eye or inform on a mate. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Some Adventures of the Inventor of the Mother Stitch
programme.desc: Barry is shocked to discover his golf captain has moved in next door when Glenda shows a keen interest in her new neighbours. Hobbo tries to help a dejected Morton feel less lonely, while Hobbos driving skills attract unwanted attention when he takes to the wheel of a truck following a visit to an inn

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Mother of All Mistakes - or Is It?
programme.desc: Hobbo discovers the whereabouts of his real mother and decides to pay her a visit, but is unimpressed by the welcome he receives. Marina chains herself to a supermarket trolley in protest against the unreliability of men, while Nelly reveals some information that greatly lifts Hobbos spirits

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Howard Cross the Atlantic Single-Handed?
programme.desc: Hobbo is convinced Nelly is his natural mother and tries to establish where he was born, while Howard vows to row across the Atlantic single-handed in a bid to counter Marinas suggestions that he lacks spontaneity. Barrys clothing problem is solved when he is called to help clear Tobys blocked drain

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: A couple attempt to sue their council after developing medical conditions they claim were caused by a local mobile phone mast used to transmit internal police communications. Meanwhile, Deed is approached by the wife of a former Iraqi minister who says her family were poisoned and killed by depleted uranium used in the British Armys shells

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The squad investigates a long-running feud between two family ice-cream businesses, which resulted in a shooting and several armed raids 10 years ago. Standing enlists the aid of his daughter in cracking the case, and she discovers evidence of drug dealing - but Pullman does not approve of her involvement. With Dennis Waterman and Amanda Redman, alongside guest star Jodie Kelly

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.sub-title: In Pursuit of the Proper Sinner
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Newly demoted Havers joins Lynley on a double murder investigation. After a girl is killed and her camping companion stabbed, two separate lines of inquiry lead the duo into a murky world of deception, corruption and prostitution in their bid to discover the murderers identity. Mystery drama, starring Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small, Timothy West and Simon Williams

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Helen is finally able to get up and about - and see the chaos that awaits her after Tristans party the night before. James puts in an offer for a family home. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Lynda Bellingham and Peter Davison

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: While reseaching her book on prisons, Dorien meets an incarcerated Chris on a visit to the Isle of Wight, and is promptly taken in by his criticisms of Sharon as a bad wife. Comedy, starring Lesley Joseph, Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Copper
programme.sub-title: The Place I Called My Home
programme.desc: Corcoran reels along with the rest of the country in the wake of national tragedy, and he, Robert Morehouse and Matthew Freeman join a national effort once more

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey tries to help ex-con Desmond, but Sharon is convinced he is a lost cause - and she is soon proved right. Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnan goes out on his stag party - but with Hollis organising it, anything could happen before the night is over

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: The campus surgery remains closed while inquiries into the mysterious death of the former campus doctor continue and Julia clashes with Eva before trying to persuade Jimmi to sweet-talk the inspector. Meanwhile, Archie finds a solution when an elderly asthmatic man proves reluctant to give up his cat

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Daniel reunites a recovering alcoholic with his estranged wife and daughter, and has a revelation about his own behaviour in the process. Ruth and Michelle bond as they battle to get the new surgerys computer system ready for the opening. Matthew Chambers and Donnaleigh Bailey star

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Diane faces a personal crisis that jeopardises her relationship with Owen, when her sister Joanna is rushed to the ward following a car crash. Ric has to deal with the repercussions of his night with Connie, while Will is frustrated by her constant criticism, and Donna gets caught in possession of drugs

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Ruth discovers a devastating secret about her husband Edward, which sends her on a downward spiral. Seeing her at rock bottom, Charlie offers emotional support, but the move comes at a huge cost to himself. Kirstys working day is disrupted by Warrens mind games, Jay and Pollys relationship runs into problems, and Jeff learns whether he still has a job as a paramedic

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnan goes out on his stag party - but with Hollis organising it, anything could happen before the night is over

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucy admits the truth to Ian, and Ricky feels Carols wrath. Bens party goes off with a bang when Shirley gets the wrong end of the stick, and an unexpected visitor appears

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucy puts Ian in an impossible situation, while Phil has something to hide. Jeans behaviour causes concern for Max - but it looks like the worst is yet to come

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James and Helen get ready to move to Rowangarth and experience more of Granville Bennetts hospitality. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Robert Hardy and Lynda Bellingham

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Leo and Orrin engage in a violent argument over Abby, causing them both to fall in the river. Meanwhile, Tom is furious with Jack for neglecting his work

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon. Frank and Lu are drawn into Stratfords Silicon Valley when Spider calls upon their help to expose a mole within tech company Forosa. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Traceys house becomes infested with mice, forcing her to shelve plans for a perfume-selling party. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos That Looking Sideways at Nelly?
programme.desc: Hobbo enlists the help of Aunty Wainwright to become a master of disguise and deceive his secret enemies, and is delighted when Marina is attracted to his new looks - to the great annoyance of Howard. Meanwhile, a misunderstanding over a neck injury puts the police on Alvin and Entwistles trail

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Nobody Messes with Tony the Throat
programme.desc: Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle set out to save the day when Howard suspects Pearl is seeing someone else and the trio soon draw up a surveillance operation that leads them to a seedy bikers club. Toby sets out to find Aunty Wainwright when he has ironing problems

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: After suffering a brush with Stella, Hobbo comes to the conclusion that it is time to find her a man - and, with the help of Clegg and Truly, he decides that eligible village heart-throb Norris Fairburn is the right match. Pearls new-found passion for motorcycling causes trouble for Howard and Marina

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: Halloween gets spookier when a ghost tour guide sees a body being buried on the beach, but when police uncover nothing, Pearl is on the lookout for a missing body

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: A taxi driver turns up dead with a bullet through his head, and an investment banker is nearly assassinated

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A man wrongly convicted of burning down a school is released, and seeks Halfords help in tracking down the culprit. Standing meets a woman who claims to be his daughter (played by Dennis Watermans real-life daughter Hannah) but Lane is not convinced she is telling the truth. Pullman is offered a promotion to head of the Murder Squad. Kevin Whately and Joe Absalom guest star

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The detectives investigate the death of a woman who has been killed in a hit-and-run incident. Suspicion falls on the man who found her body, but he denies ever having met her. Lynley and Havers visit the victims estranged husband and son, neither of whom has seen her since she walked out after her daughters murder 30 years previously. Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small star

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James and Helen get ready to move to Rowangarth and experience more of Granville Bennetts hospitality. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Robert Hardy and Lynda Bellingham

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: From the Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a museums Egyptian mummy case turns out to contain the body of a very recently deceased woman

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon gets a shock when Social Security staff realise they are authorising rent payments for her old flat when she is no longer living there and her lodger is in prison

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnans wedding day dawns, but the reappearance of Garfield is just one of the many clouds on the horizon

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Melody helps a film studies lecturer and his student who are willing to sacrifice their careers to protect their illicit romance. programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ruth helps a pregnant girl stand up to the father of her baby. Vivien experiences problems with public transport and takes out her frustrations at work, while Eva considers moving back in with Jimmi - after coming to a certain agreement

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Rosie receives good news, but Mubbs does not seem interested, and Diane struggles to cope as Joannas life hangs in the balance - along with that of her unborn baby. Meanwhile, the driver responsible attempts to chat up Donna, but when she learns he is a drug dealer she goes behind Zubins back to arrange his downfall

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Broadcaster and journalist Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of Americas most notorious female murderers, in a quest to discover what drives a woman to kill. He travels to Lowell Correctional Institute in Florida to talk to Rebecca Fenton, convicted for the murder of her husband Larry, who was shot dead in their home. He also looks into the details of the case, learning how for several years it seemed she was going to get away with the crime, until the involvement of the FBI helped bring her to justice

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Homestead Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Amber Wright, who, at the age of 15 conspired with a group of friends to murder her ex-boyfriend Seath Jackson, an innocent teenage boy who was beaten, shot, and knee-capped before his corpse was burnt and his remains thrown in a quarry. Later, Piers travels to meet Seaths parents in Summerfield, Florida, with their visceral anger standing in stark contrast to Ambers cool demeanour. It soon emerges that Amber was a central player in the plot to kill Seath, but will she take responsibility for her actions?

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex is hit hard by the struggles of patients going through IVF. After a previous miscarriage, Jasmine and Rumen want a second child, while Rumen is in remission for cancer

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Nearing the end of her training, Alex is allowed to assist in complex cases. She meets Holly who has a rare split womb and is attempting her sixth round of IVF with her husband

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williamss condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Carson wants a Nashville pad of her own, but finding the perfect home could be tough

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: The brothers help empty-nesters Karen and Rick, who are looking for a deluxe retreat

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible. The family have decided that Karis should move in with her older sister Jo, but her entire home is inaccessible for Karis, so the team decides to build a large two-storey extension to make the house more suitable. Elsewhere, Billy takes on jousting at Warwick Castle

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williamss condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats nine-month-old cockapoo Betsy, whose owners Sophie and Dan are concerned about a dragging front paw caused by nerve damage, to see if there are surgical options. But when Betsy develops gangrene, she has to have her paw amputated, and in order to salvage the rest of her limb, Noel must replace her amputated foot with a skeletally-anchored implant called a PerFiTS (Percutaneous Fixation to the Skeleton)

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Florida woman Jennifer Mee who, as a teenager, became a media sensation when she suffered a particularly strange ailment - a persistent case of hiccups. But in 2010, she lured a man to a dark alleyway where her friends were waiting to rob him. Instead he ended up being shot dead. Even though she didnt pull the trigger, and was nowhere near when the bullets were fired, Jennifer was sentenced to life without parole. Piers charts the journey through fame and rejection that saw Jennifer descend into a criminal lifestyle, and asks family members and legal experts if they believe her punishment was too harsh

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility near Tallahassee in Florida, where he hears the story of Ashley Humphrey. As a 20-year-old in 2003, she pumped eight bullets into barmaid Sandee Rozzo - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years. Piers tries to understand how she came to commit the crime, wondering whether she was persuaded by her domineering and abusive husband - who was being accused of rape by the victim - or if she is simply a cold-blooded killer who came up with the plan herself

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Theres heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackmans vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, theyll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But hes facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Drew Scott and Jonathan Scott come to the aid of Joe and Jessie, who are searching for a large farmhouse-style home

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan Scott host the property renovation series. Nicoles music career is taking flight, so the Scott twins try to help her find a great home

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Hessle, near Hull in East Yorkshire, to transform the home of Darren Hudson, who was left paralysed from the waist down due to a spinal cord injury. After three months of hospital rehabilitation, Darren returned home to his family, but tragedy struck again eight days later when his wife Sarah died suddenly. Since that moment, Darren and his three sons have been living in emotional trauma, with the wheelchair-using dad now the main carer for the family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackmans vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, theyll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The discovery of underwear on a canal bank sparks a risky missing persons search and a police incident ends in a fleeing car passenger jumping over a wall and breaking his leg

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The documentary follows 32-year-old Naomi, who arrives to give birth wearing false eyelashes and full make-up, and single mother-to-be Bianca, who was shocked to discover she was pregnant a few days after her 22nd birthday. Meanwhile, Shannon and her partner Dale were both 17 when they announced they were expecting a baby and have had to deal with people who claim they are too young for the responsibility

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Dawn, who endured a traumatic birth in the last series, returns to have another baby, stirring up memories of her difficult experience in the same operating theatre. Meanwhile, 29-year-old Kirri manages without pain relief, laughing her way through her contractions, and Shannon, 34, fears husband Chris may miss the birth of their second child as he must look after their 20-month-old daughter

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster travels to Bedford Hills Correctional Facility in New York State to meet Sheila Davalloo, who has been convicted for murdering Anna Lisa Raymundo. However, in a bizarre twist to the story, Sheila has not yet started her 50-year sentence. First she must finish the 25 years she was given for the attempted murder of her husband. Sheila has remained silent about the killing for 14 years, so Piers tries to get her to finally open up, while also looking into why she wanted both of her victims out of the way

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: Transgender inmate Franklin falls in love with a fellow prisoner, but they must keep their relationship a secret or face being placed in solitary confinement. A fight breaks out over a carton of milk, and a pregnant prisoner trying to recover from heroin addiction faces losing a place on a treatment programme - which could result in her baby being born in prison and taken from her

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Louis revisits his 2011 documentary Americas Most Dangerous Pets, returning to Oklahoma to explore what has happened since. Joe Exotic, aka Joseph Allen Maldonado-Passage, now resides in a federal prison after being found guilty of a murder-for-hire plot and multiple animal cruelty charges, and having been the subject of hit Netflix documentary Tiger King

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Homestead Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Amber Wright, who, at the age of 15 conspired with a group of friends to murder her ex-boyfriend Seath Jackson, an innocent teenage boy who was beaten, shot, and knee-capped before his corpse was burnt and his remains thrown in a quarry. Later, Piers travels to meet Seaths parents in Summerfield, Florida, with their visceral anger standing in stark contrast to Ambers cool demeanour. It soon emerges that Amber was a central player in the plot to kill Seath, but will she take responsibility for her actions?

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex is hit hard by the struggles of patients going through IVF. After a previous miscarriage, Jasmine and Rumen want a second child, while Rumen is in remission for cancer

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Nearing the end of her training, Alex is allowed to assist in complex cases. She meets Holly who has a rare split womb and is attempting her sixth round of IVF with her husband

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williamss condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Carson wants a Nashville pad of her own, but finding the perfect home could be tough

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: The brothers help empty-nesters Karen and Rick, who are looking for a deluxe retreat

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible. The family have decided that Karis should move in with her older sister Jo, but her entire home is inaccessible for Karis, so the team decides to build a large two-storey extension to make the house more suitable. Elsewhere, Billy takes on jousting at Warwick Castle

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williamss condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats nine-month-old cockapoo Betsy, whose owners Sophie and Dan are concerned about a dragging front paw caused by nerve damage, to see if there are surgical options. But when Betsy develops gangrene, she has to have her paw amputated, and in order to salvage the rest of her limb, Noel must replace her amputated foot with a skeletally-anchored implant called a PerFiTS (Percutaneous Fixation to the Skeleton)

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Florida woman Jennifer Mee who, as a teenager, became a media sensation when she suffered a particularly strange ailment - a persistent case of hiccups. But in 2010, she lured a man to a dark alleyway where her friends were waiting to rob him. Instead he ended up being shot dead. Even though she didnt pull the trigger, and was nowhere near when the bullets were fired, Jennifer was sentenced to life without parole. Piers charts the journey through fame and rejection that saw Jennifer descend into a criminal lifestyle, and asks family members and legal experts if they believe her punishment was too harsh

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility near Tallahassee in Florida, where he hears the story of Ashley Humphrey. As a 20-year-old in 2003, she pumped eight bullets into barmaid Sandee Rozzo - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years. Piers tries to understand how she came to commit the crime, wondering whether she was persuaded by her domineering and abusive husband - who was being accused of rape by the victim - or if she is simply a cold-blooded killer who came up with the plan herself

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Theres heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: In this emotional final episode, Alex comes to the end of her training at Kings and three couples await their results. Will they finally become parents?

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But hes facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up an impressive five vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors. Pauls out on the road collecting a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV, before he is off admiring the treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to collect some vintage motorcycles from a garage at the bottom of the garden in the North-East of England

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Derek has his work cut out trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting the garage roof. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels between Taunton and Newton Abbot. Along the way he joins in with a fertility dance in Stogumber, visits a celebrated garden at Hestercombe to discover the fruits of an unusual partnership, and enjoys a trip aboard the longest heritage line in England

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the trail of an historic achievement made at the dawn of the Edwardian era, Michael Portillo investigates the first radio signal to be sent across the Atlantic. Then, in Plymouth, he uncovers what happened to surviving crew members of the most famous ocean liner in history, the Titanic. Later, at Fowey, the former politician rediscovers a lost literary figure known as Q, who immortalised the town in his novels

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey from East Yorkshire to Caernarfon, beginning by travelling from the city of Hull to the North Yorkshire market town of Malton

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his Edwardian Bradshaws guide, Michael Portillo conducts important research in an historic tea room, built by an Edwardian immigrant to the city of York. In Leeds he discovers the citys textile heritage, and also investigates Bradfords musical heritage

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewsons auction - a 1275 Mini GT thats come from just down the road that could be a future British icon

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, theres an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler has his mind on making Germany into a great empire by expanding eastwards, but his invasion of Poland tips the world into a violent and bloody war

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. One such woman was German Beate Klarsfeld, determined to right the wrongs of her countrys dark past and identify Nazis who had gone unpunished - including the notorious Klaus Barbie. The documentary also tells the story of Josef Mengele - who performed gruesome experiments on Auschwitz inmates - and the son so appalled by his fathers actions he considered turning him in

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from the Royal Botanic Garden in Edinburgh, where Adam Schoon gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to see the Scottish Cup, the most important trophy in Scottish football, and he finds out more about - Andrew Watson, considered the first black international footballer. Items brought in to be valued include a carrier bag full of rare Russian jewels, a collection of dolls house crockery, and a black opal necklace

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Aston Hall in Birmingham, and is joined by poet Benjamin Zephaniah, who grew up nearby and has fond childhood memories of playing in the grounds. Among the items brought in to be valued are some ornate and valuable ceremonial weapons from India, a collection of clocks, a pedal car, and the autographs of the Beatles - given to a fan in return for joining them in a water pistol shoot-out

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Red E Type and Fast Fords
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome with the money. Two Ford Escorts get Daves pulse racing

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A widow reluctantly parts with her husbands treasured collection of Rolls-Royces and Bentleys, and an impulse buyer finds one of the cars a new home

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler has his mind on making Germany into a great empire by expanding eastwards, but his invasion of Poland tips the world into a violent and bloody war

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from the Royal Botanic Garden in Edinburgh, where Adam Schoon gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to see the Scottish Cup, the most important trophy in Scottish football, and he finds out more about - Andrew Watson, considered the first black international footballer. Items brought in to be valued include a carrier bag full of rare Russian jewels, a collection of dolls house crockery, and a black opal necklace

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV, before he is off admiring the treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to collect some vintage motorcycles from a garage at the bottom of the garden in the North-East of England

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Derek has his work cut out trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting the garage roof. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels between Taunton and Newton Abbot. Along the way he joins in with a fertility dance in Stogumber, visits a celebrated garden at Hestercombe to discover the fruits of an unusual partnership, and enjoys a trip aboard the longest heritage line in England

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the trail of an historic achievement made at the dawn of the Edwardian era, Michael Portillo investigates the first radio signal to be sent across the Atlantic. Then, in Plymouth, he uncovers what happened to surviving crew members of the most famous ocean liner in history, the Titanic. Later, at Fowey, the former politician rediscovers a lost literary figure known as Q, who immortalised the town in his novels

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey from East Yorkshire to Caernarfon, beginning by travelling from the city of Hull to the North Yorkshire market town of Malton

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his Edwardian Bradshaws guide, Michael Portillo conducts important research in an historic tea room, built by an Edwardian immigrant to the city of York. In Leeds he discovers the citys textile heritage, and also investigates Bradfords musical heritage

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewsons auction - a 1275 Mini GT thats come from just down the road that could be a future British icon

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, theres an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler has his mind on making Germany into a great empire by expanding eastwards, but his invasion of Poland tips the world into a violent and bloody war

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. One such woman was German Beate Klarsfeld, determined to right the wrongs of her countrys dark past and identify Nazis who had gone unpunished - including the notorious Klaus Barbie. The documentary also tells the story of Josef Mengele - who performed gruesome experiments on Auschwitz inmates - and the son so appalled by his fathers actions he considered turning him in

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from the Royal Botanic Garden in Edinburgh, where Adam Schoon gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to see the Scottish Cup, the most important trophy in Scottish football, and he finds out more about - Andrew Watson, considered the first black international footballer. Items brought in to be valued include a carrier bag full of rare Russian jewels, a collection of dolls house crockery, and a black opal necklace

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Aston Hall in Birmingham, and is joined by poet Benjamin Zephaniah, who grew up nearby and has fond childhood memories of playing in the grounds. Among the items brought in to be valued are some ornate and valuable ceremonial weapons from India, a collection of clocks, a pedal car, and the autographs of the Beatles - given to a fan in return for joining them in a water pistol shoot-out

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Tom and Tom host a friends-and-family event at Schwartz and Sandys, but when Lisa questions them about the bars status, they come clean about their dire situation

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: America boasts a species of fish reputed to have committed a number of violent attacks on humans. The alligator gar is said to be as vicious as a shark and as large as an alligator. Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas on a hunt to uncover the truth about the notorious creature

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A patient who set fire to his own shop (guest star Tony Slattery) attempts to avoid police questioning by leaping into an ambulance and driving off towards the pier - unaware Alun and a sick man are in the back of the vehicle. Meanwhile, Dr Makori fears for her relationship with Dr Fox when he tells her he has been offered a job in Biafra. Medical drama, with Andy Wear, Paul Fox and Kananu Kirimi

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The five-time Paralympian recalls her life as an elite swimmer and her journey to gold in Rio 2016

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Cardiff, bricklayer Alex, support worker Kevin and plasterer Zhane are all hoping to win a date with Shannon, a self-proclaimed modern-day Marilyn Monroe

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In London, Amanda, Katy and Alex battle it out to impress Georgina with their style choices. With nothing but their chosen outfits to help her decide, who will Georgina choose to take out on a first date?

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen host the celebrity cooking contest as Kelly Holmes, Anne Hegerty, Ranj Singh and Maura Higgins take to the kitchen in head-to-head cooking battles as they each attempt to create the perfect Spanish dish and avoid elimination in the Cook Off. There is panic over tapas, an unfortunate meat burn, some dramatic croquettas and a wobble over a paella - will they manage to finish their Spanish dishes before the time runs out?

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Part one of two. The former Republic of Ireland manager sits down with Tommy Martin. In the first part, he discusses his playing days, including the glory years of Irelands World Cup campaigns

programme.title: The Six OClock Show
programme.desc: A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country?s top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines

programme.title: Gift Wrapped
programme.desc: Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford host the quiz offering three engaged couples the chance to win their wedding gift list and a dream holiday. The betrothed pairs work together across a series of rounds to see off their opponents

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: A profile of the Gaelic football legend who grew up in The Troubles in Armagh, and recovered from a missed penalty to score the winning goal in their only All-Ireland win

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Tommy Martin interviews the former Republic of Ireland footballer, who reflects on a career that began in the League of Ireland, and saw him move to the top of the English game

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: A Year on My Planet Earth
programme.desc: The stories of the scientists and conservationists who used pioneering techniques to uncover new behaviour, enabling the film-makers to producer this extraordinary series

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Reports of attacks in a remote part of Ukraine take extreme angler Jeremy Wade on a hunt for an elusive lake monster, and to the site of the worlds worst nuclear accident - Chernobyls reactor number four. Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen return with the celebrity cooking contest in which famous faces are mentored by world-class chefs as they compete in culinary cooking battles. in the opening edition, Carol Vorderman, Abbey Clancy, Pasha Kovalev and Harry Pinero compete to deliver stand-out dinner party dishes and progress to the next round

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh welcomes Maud from Belfast, who takes on the Chasers in the hope of a trip on the Orient Express. Back to the Future fan Richy attempts to win enough for his own DeLorean, and Stuart from Dorset is after enough cash for a campervan

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Daily magazine, featuring a mix of celebrity chat, showbusiness news, lifestyle features, topical discussion, health and beauty advice and more

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Germany to investigate tales of a beast that has been on the prowl in European waters for the past 700 years. His investigations take him to Spain, where he discovers first-hand that as a consequence of a science experiment gone wrong, the Wels catfish is growing to man-eating proportions and is capable of everything depicted in medieval records

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A wedding reception held on Elsinby Pier ends in tragedy when a fishing trawler sails badly off course. Meanwhile, Adam faces up to a tough decision and the staff at the hospital prepare for a new arrival as Jill goes into labour. Robert Cavanah and Amy Robbins star

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Part one of an interview with the pundit, activist, barrister and former footballer, who opens up about his life, trauma and controversies

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: The show returns to Cardiff, where beautician Leah is waiting to be swept off her feet by the style choices of either law graduate Lloyd, judo champion Aron or student Daffyd. With only their outfits to help her decide, which lad will Leah choose to join her for a romantic date?

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In London, coffee shop supervisor Holly, singer Millie and care assistant Megan seek out stylish outfits for actor John, in the hope he may select one of them for a date

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Famous faces cook up a storm week by week in a bid to outdo their rivals. Each of the celebrity contestants are paired with a professional chef who will mentor and teach them to prepare restaurant quality dishes. Tonight, the remaining celebrities take on the food of India as they battle to stay in the competition. Presented by Emma Willis and Tom Allen

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Part two of two. The former Republic of Ireland manager opens up about life as a manager, taking the Ireland job twice, the 2002 World Cup, and the infamous relationship with Roy Keane

programme.title: The Six OClock Show
programme.desc: Chat show featuring celebrity interviews, food from leading chefs and guidance on a wide range of topics, from consumer affairs to the latest trends, with viewers invited to contribute with pictures, comments, stories and gossip

programme.title: Gift Wrapped
programme.desc: Quiz show in which three engaged couples get the chance to win their wedding gift list and a dream holiday. The betrothed pairs work together across a series of rounds to see off their opponents. Hosted by Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: A profile of the former Leinster and Italy rugby player, who lost sight in his eye following a horrific injury

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: An interview with the former Crystal Palace and Republic of Ireland defender, who discusses the highs and lows of his career

programme.title: Animal Emergency
programme.desc: A French bulldog arrives at the vets for specialist spinal surgery to help him walk properly. Staff in the large animal department have to decide if a wild seals eye is able to be saved, and nurse Clodagh and vet Myles have to look long and hard to find a magnet in a parrots gizzard

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In the heart of Central America lurks a marine creature believed to reach 8ft in length and weigh up to 300lbs. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is taken to breaking point as he re-evaluates everything he knows about fishing in an attempt to catch this monster - which is known to leap into boats and cause fatal injuries

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen host as Katherine Ryan, Christopher Biggins, Linford Christie and Ellie Simmonds produce gourmet dishes using only tinned, frozen and pantry ingredients to secure their place in the next round

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Kieron, Angie, Lynn and Tom pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman is unaware that the home she inherited from her father has a $400k outstanding loan on it and is in danger of being foreclosed.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The fossil record shows that the arapaima fish has roamed the waters of the Amazon River since the Jurassic age, and uses its bony tongue to crush prey against the roof of its mouth before swallowing. Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade encountered the species once before and came out second best, so this time he is taking no chances as he investigates every aspect of this huge creature

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: After finding out about the hospitals staffing problems, Jill offers to cut short her maternity leave and return to work, while Matron notices that Catherine is doing her best to avoid Adam. Out in Africa, Jeff faces the horrors of war and makes a promise to a dying woman - but faces difficulties in keeping his word

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The concluding part of an interview with the Derry legend, who discusses his colourful football career and the place GAA has in society

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Cardiff, drama student Josiah, factory worker Daniel and support worker Tomas hope to win a date with make-up artist Chanel. All they have to do is find her the perfect outfit - limited only by time, budget and their own sense of style

programme.title: Tour de Fred
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix takes to the streets and roads of Cork City, testing his stamina with a cycle challenge up St Patricks Hill, one of the citys most famous climbs. He samples Corks famous stout at Murphys Brewery, trains with a womens GAA team, discovers Corks past as the worlds butter capital, tries ceili dancing and cycles to Blarney Castle

programme.title: Romesh Ranganathans Parents Evening
programme.desc: Comedy game show in which celebrities team up with family members, with the parents choosing which questions their children will answer and gambling on how many they can get right. The first edition features Match of the Day presenter Gabby Logan and her daughter Lois, reality TV star Pete Wicks and his mum Tracey and journalist Krishnan Guru-Murthy and his daughter Jasmine

programme.title: Betrayal
programme.desc: John is still reeling after his discovery that a proxy attack is possibly being planned on UK soil to target a prominent Iranian dissident, but a visit to an informants widow throws up contradictory evidence. John becomes convinced that there is a cover-up that permeates to the highest level. Meanwhile, Johns refusal to accept voluntary redundancy means his relationship with Claire is on thin ice, and a visit from his in-laws only stokes tensions. Thriller, starring Shaun Evans and Romola Garai

programme.desc: Chat show featuring celebrity interviews, food from leading chefs and guidance on a wide range of topics, from consumer affairs to the latest trends, with viewers invited to contribute with pictures, comments, stories and gossip

programme.title: The Chase

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quiz in which contestants are given their prize money before they have answered a question, and must race against time to keep hold of it. Each player stands before an hourglass-shaped money timer that begins to drain as the questions are asked - and the only way of stopping it is to answer correctly. Once the money is gone, the contestant is out - and only one can make the final to play for the amount they have managed to save

Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon, Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan, Adam suffers a dramatic loss of business, and Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from holiday

programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is joined by his Olympic medal-winning diver daughter Andrea Spendolini-Sirieix to take on a series of cycle rides along the sometimes challenging but often spectacular roads of West Cork. programme.title: Cracker
programme.sub-title: The Mad Woman in the Attic - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. First-ever episode of the acclaimed crime drama, starring Robbie Coltrane.
