Comedy-drama, starring Helen Baxendale, James Nesbitt, John Thomson, Fay Ripley, Robert Bathurst and Hermione Norris

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder examines real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Ginas new cellar man Len Carter when a valuable pendant is stolen from Emily Forster, a guest at the Aidensfield Arms. A search into the barmans past reveals a history of crime, but Emily appears more disturbed by the presence of pub comedian Tommy Tanner. Meanwhile, Peggy secures a good deal on a new vehicle and Geoffs need for speed gets the better of him

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie and Martha smudge the mayors mansion for her housewarming gala. Abigail and Donovan reunite and put up a final fight against the Merriwick-Davenport curse

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The incredible efforts to ensure that the hastily constructed temporary fix around the damaged reactor at Chernobyl becomes a permanent solution, known as the New Safe Confinement

programme.title: Judi Loves Culinary Cruise
programme.desc: The presenter stops at the archaeological site of Delphi in Greece, where she visits its famous ruins, meets the inhabitants of a bee farm, and tastes their honey. Judi also visits a family run bakery, where she makes the famous kaitafi dessert with owner Sophocles, has a party with pastry, and cooks up a dish of honey and rum peaches with mini doughnuts

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: From Canadas waterlogged wilderness come stories of a 20-ft lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news stories from 2002, the year of Roy Keanes famous spat with Mick McCarthy, igniting a national debate that continues to this day. Bertie Ahern led Fianna Fail to victory in the general election but fell just short of an overall majority and a levy of 15 per cent was introduced on plastic bags

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The slaughtermen arrive at an Aidensfield farm where a suspected case of foot-and-mouth disease has been reported, but receive a hostile reception. Nick is enlisted to help restore the peace - and gets drawn into a tragedy. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Mountain Vets
programme.desc: It is summer in the Mournes and temperatures are the highest on record, giving the vets a new set of challenges including overheated dogs, dehydrated calves and hot badgers

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi travels to Falmouths Meudon Hotel, which was once a jewel of the Cornish coast but has failed to move with the times, leading to a lack of guests and low profits. Alex soon gets to the root of the family businesss problem - 86-year-old Harry Pilgrims refusal to let go of the reins has left son Mark frustrated in his role as general manager. Alex also believes the old-fashioned decor and unimaginative menu only attracts elderly clientele, so she sets about bringing the hotel into the 21st century. But can she persuade Mark to be more forceful as a leader?

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Isaac is upset that his dad has cancer, while Cain is preoccupied in his search for farmland and Pollard tests Kerrys loyalty

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Daniel seeks answers from Megan about the future of their relationship, and Theo hatches a new plan, announcing that hes been offered a job in Belfast before spiking an oblivious Todds drink

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Dr Goodwin is accused of taking sides when he goes too far to help a woman who claims her husband is hitting her, and there is a mystery to solve when a patient is admitted under a false name. Meanwhile, Dr Ormerods strange behaviour shows signs of becoming worse - and Frankie fears the surgeon is becoming addicted to his medication. Medical drama, with Robert Daws, Wendy Craig and Amy Robbins

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: An armed robbery ends in murder and Frost wastes no time in arresting a known crook he saw at the scene during the getaway, convinced he is one of the men responsible. With this little mystery to solve, as well as a case of four burglaries in as many days at the same house, the dogged policemans lot proves a busy one indeed. David Jason stars, with Billy Murray and James Hayes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An Army deserter arrives in the village following a bust-up with his sadistic sergeant and causes problems for the Rowans when he starts stealing food to survive. The fugitive is only discovered when Nick investigates a series of break-ins around the village. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Cold Feet
programme.desc: Karen is offered the job of editing Booker Prize-winning author Alex Welchs new novel, but cant decide whether to accept, until she claps eyes on him and realises hes handsome, charming and everything a man should be. Unfortunately, it isnt long before nanny Ramona overhears her reading a steamy passage from the manuscript aloud - and promptly gets hold of the wrong end of the stick. Hermione Norris and Denis Lawson star

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon, Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan, Adam suffers a dramatic loss of business, and Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from holiday

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Joe blackmails Robert and Aaron, Kim hires Ross, and Kerry is shocked

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Left with no alternative after a series of turbulent events, Casey calls in Voights Intelligence Unit, but learns the hard way that revenge was on the detectives mind during his stint in prison. Meanwhile, Mills and Dawson try to juggle their personal problems with the opening of Mollys bar, and Shay makes progress in her plan to become a parent, giving the team a reason to celebrate

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: Thanks to Ulysses cyber-infiltration, Lucie and her team are finally able to identify terrorists planning to carry out and attack in France. Malika decides to return to Syria to mobilise Yassine. Spy thriller, starring Rachida Brakni, Fleur Geffrier, Vincent Elbaz and Pierre Perrier. In French

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder examines real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordlys tenants are angered when his new estate manager Jimbo Brady employs the hard-line methods learned in South Africa and raises their rents. Brian Rogers faces eviction, but suspicion is more widespread when Jimbos vehicle is sabotaged. Meanwhile, Peggy believes she has found the explanation for Davids recent behaviour

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie and Sams much overdue date doesnt go as planned, and they end up stranded on an island; Joy dreams about her parents. Catherine Bnell stars

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: How a team of intrepid engineers keep the London Array, one of the largest offshore wind farms on the planet, maintained and producing electricity whatever the weather

programme.title: The Real Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Nine celebrities embark on an experimental adventure to Udaipur in India, to test whether they can set up a more rewarding retirement than in the UK. Selina Scott, Susan George, Stephanie Beacham, Syd Little, Peter Dean, Bob Champion, Stanley Johnson and the Krankies are the volunteers. However, while veteran of India Stanley throws himself into the experiment with aplomb, Selina is unsure about the group living arrangements and first-time curry eater Bob struggles with the diet

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water thats sliced cleanly through a young mans testicles, is enough to lure fishing detective Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims whove been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Headline stories from 2003, accompanied by the music of the time

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An Army deserter arrives in the village following a bust-up with his sadistic sergeant and causes problems for the Rowans when he starts stealing food to survive. The fugitive is only discovered when Nick investigates a series of break-ins around the village. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Mountain Vets
programme.desc: Vet Nigel discovers a worrying growth on much-loved cow Florence, but will she have a second chance? And Gillian must perform surgery on dog Bailey so that he can be rehomed

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits the White Hart in St Albans, Hertfordshire, a reputedly haunted hotel run by husband-and-wife team Ross and Jayne McBeath. Capitalising on its spooky reputation, Jayne organises ghost tours complete with skeletons and cackling witches, but the themed restaurant menu seems to be scaring off the guests. To make matters worse, the McBeaths are facing fierce competition from rival establishments and spend most of their time arguing about how to save their business

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Joe blackmails Robert and Aaron, Kim hires Ross, and Kerry is shocked

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon, Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan, Adam suffers a dramatic loss of business, and Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from holiday

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: The hospital has its hands full when a typhoid epidemic breaks out in the community. Things get worse as the diseases source is traced back to the wards and staff struggle to locate it. Dr Weatherill is forced to reprimand Dr Ormerod after catching him sleeping on the job - but also has startling news for him. Drama, starring Robert Daws and Amy Robbins

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jacks house burns down, forcing him to move in with a colleague. At work, he becomes involved in the search for a kidnapper after a young woman disappears. Long-running crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Marc Warren

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Kate must act quickly when a woman takes an overdose, in the belief that her husband has been falsely imprisoned. Meanwhile, Phil learns Jennifer is pregnant and agrees to marry her, but may not survive his stag night at the pub. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry, Niamh Cusack and Mark Jordan

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates when a seemingly beloved resident of a coastal community is fatally driven off the road, and realises she has to dig up the victims past to have any chance of unmasking the killer. Joined by her faithful team, including DC Kenny Lockhart and new recruit DC Jac Williams, Vera attempts to find the missing link that will crack the case, but finds it difficult to get to the truth when everyone they encounter seems to be protecting a secret. Crime drama based on Ann Cleeves series of novels, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo tries a charm offensive on George and Christina, Kit panics when Mal names his attacker, Betsy and Dylan babysit Connie, and Hope warns Sam against listening to Daniel

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain explodes with suppressed rage, Tracy is guilty, and Dawn questions Kim

programme.title: Essex County
programme.desc: A story of loss and loneliness tracing the interconnected lives of two families in a rural community. Canadian drama, based on the graphic novel by Jeff Lemire

programme.title: Vigil
programme.desc: Amy confronts one of the crew with her discoveries about their deception, but with her mental health suffering, questions are asked about her fitness to investigate. On land, Kirsten refuses to bow to pressure from the authorities and has concerns that they are orchestrating a cover up. As she closes in on the killer, their capture reveals the grave threat that the vessel faces

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina and Phil make the final preparations for their big day, but the grooms uneventful stag night stirs up some pre-wedding nerves. Rob and Peggy prepare a surprise for the soon-to-be-wed couple, and the village grows concerned when an elderly resident mysteriously disappears. Tricia Penrose, Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie and Sams double date with hospital administrator Grant and his girlfriend Monica, doesnt go quite as planned. Martha organizes a Grease themed movie night in the park. Stars Catherine Bell and James Denton. The Party The Party Cassie and Sams much overdue date doesnt go as planned and they end up stranded on an island. Joy dreams about her parents. Catherine Bell and James Denton star

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The creation of Hudson Yards on Manhattan Island, New York, a construction project built over the tracks and railway sidings of Penn Station - literally in thin air

programme.title: The Real Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Selina Scott, Susan George, Stephanie Beacham, Ian and Janette Tough, Syd Little, Peter Dean, Bob Champion and Stanley Johnson embrace life in Udaipur in India. They receive a grand invitation from the Maharanah and are invited to mingle with Udaipurs high society at the City Palace, ending the week with a trip to the northern state of the Punjab to visit one of Indias most spectacular and holiest cities and the magnificent Golden Temple in Amritsar

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: Layton realises some dreams are out of reach as the rest of the train deals with his status change. Wilford makes a staggering discovery

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Life within a specialist clinic, where a team of top dermatologists treats a range of skin conditions for patients who often havent been able to get treatment on the NHS

programme.title: Party Animals
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a group of twentysomething political researchers working for MPs in Westminster. Junior minister Jo Porter is humiliated by her Tory counterpart James Northcote in a debate on youth crime. She demands reasons for the debacle from her researcher Danny, whose lobbyist brother Scott is busy trying to make contacts among the Conservatives. With Raquel Cassidy and Patrick Baladi

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Claire from Glasgow, Gordon from Glossop, Elliott from South Shields and Risha from London pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Rosie from Chelmsford, Steve originally from Wakefield, Kallan from Cardiff and Seb from Wareham take on one of the countrys finest quiz brains

Can Trainers Championship contenders Dan Skelton and Willie Mullins overcome last years winner, the Lucinda Russell-trained horse, Corach Rambler? Or will it be a fairy tale David vs Goliath victory for amateur jockey Gina Andrew and her trainer husband, Tom Ellis with their family bred horse, Latenightpass?

The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Vardy v Rooney: A Courtroom Drama
programme.desc: Dramatic recreation of the sensational Wagatha Christie trial - one of the most extraordinary libel cases ever to be brought before the High Court as two footballers wives came to blows, with Rebekah Vardy trying to sue Coleen Rooney for defamation. The origins of the dispute lay in a 2019 tweet in which Rooney publicly accused Vardy of selling stories to the press about her. With Natalia Tena, Chanel Cresswell and Michael Sheen

programme.desc: The untold stories of how celebrities have struggled, been canceled or fallen - only to rise again

programme.desc: Altman mentors a new broker who once took a chance on him, and will Tracy live to regret her decision when she brings Flagg in on a deal?

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Tracy and Heather aim to prove that two blondes are better than one when they score more than they bargained for with a Beverly Hills home.

With Natalia Tena, Chanel Cresswell and Michael Sheen

programme.title: Bargain Fever Britain
programme.desc: Part one of two. While the economy has struggled in recent years, the discount retail sector has boomed, with an increasing number of people flocking to pound stores and clearance sales, buying in bulk and cutting out coupons. This documentary provides an inside look at four major businesses that are thriving in the current climate - American wholesale giant Costco, car supermarket Motorpoint, footwear chain Shoe Zone, and Approved Food, which sells products that are approaching or already past their best-before dates. Narrated by Jill Halfpenny

programme.desc: Gavan Reilly and guests break down the weeks political diary, key Cabinet issues, major stories shaping the national agenda, and the impact of upcoming decisions.
